1001.Name: March 7th
1001.Desc: A girl who once slumbered in eternal ice and knows nothing about her past.\nTo find out the truth about her origins, she decided to travel with the Astral Express.\nAs of right now, she has prepared about <unbreak>67</unbreak> different versions of her life story for herself.

1.Name: Memory of You
1.Desc: Every time March 7th's Ultimate Freezes a target, she regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

2.Name: Memory of It
2.Desc: Upon entering battle, grants a Shield equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of March 7th's DEF plus <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> to the ally with the lowest HP percentage, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.Name: Memory of Everything
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Never Forfeit Again
4.Desc: The Talent's <u>Counter</u> effect can be triggered 1 more time in each turn. The DMG dealt by <u>Counter</u> increases by an amount that is equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of March 7th's DEF.

10000003.Name: Counter
10000003.Desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

5.Name: Never Forget Again
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Just Like This, Always...
6.Desc: Allies under the protection of the Shield granted by the Skill restore HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> at the beginning of each turn.

100101.Name: Frigid Cold Arrow
100101.Desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's ATK to one enemy.
100101.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

100102.Name: The Power of Cuteness
100102.Desc: Provides a single ally with a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's DEF plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nIf the ally's current HP percentage is <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> or higher, greatly increases the chance of enemies attacking that ally.
100102.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Applies a Shield</color> on a single ally.

100103.Name: Glacial Cascade
100103.Desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's ATK to all enemies. Hit enemies have a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to be Frozen for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Frozen, enemies cannot take action and will receive Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of March 7th's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
100103.SimpleDesc: Deals Ice DMG to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>, with <color=#f29e38ff>a chance of Freezing them</color>.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100104.Name: Girl Power
100104.Desc: After a Shielded ally is attacked by an enemy, March 7th immediately <u>Counters</u>, dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK. This effect can be triggered <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) each turn.
100104.SimpleDesc: After a Shielded ally is attacked by an enemy, March 7th <color=#f29e38ff>immediately launches a <u>Counter</u></color> against the attacker, dealing minor Ice DMG.

10000003.Name: Counter
10000003.Desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

100106.Name: Attack
100106.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100107.Name: Freezing Beauty
100107.Desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Freeze a random enemy for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile Frozen, the enemy cannot take action and will take Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of March 7th's ATK at the beginning of each turn.
100107.SimpleDesc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, there is a high chance of inflicting Freeze on a random enemy.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.PointDesc: When using Skill, dispels 1 <u>debuff</u> from one designated ally.

10000010.Name: Debuff
10000010.Desc: Debuffs are negative status effects that render units weaker. Unless otherwise specified, debuffs can be dispelled.

1.PointDesc: The duration of the Shield generated from Skill is extended for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
When using Ultimate, increases the <u>base chance</u> to Freeze enemies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1002.Name: Dan Heng
1002.Desc: A cold and reserved young man who is reticent about his past.\nTo avoid his kin, he decided to travel with the Astral Express.

1.Name: The Higher You Fly, the Harder You Fall
1.Desc: When the target enemy's current HP percentage is greater than or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, CRIT Rate increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

2.Name: Quell the Venom Octet, Quench the Vice O'Flame
2.Desc: Reduces Talent cooldown by 1 turn.

3.Name: Seen and Unseen
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Roaring Dragon and Soaring Sun
4.Desc: When Dan Heng uses his Ultimate to defeat an enemy, he will immediately take action again.

5.Name: A Drop of Rain Feeds a Torrent
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: The Troubled Soul Lies in Wait
6.Desc: The Slow state triggered by Skill reduces the enemy's SPD by an extra <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

100201.Name: Cloudlancer Art: North Wind
100201.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng's ATK to one enemy.
100201.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

100202.Name: Cloudlancer Art: Torrent
100202.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng's ATK to one designated enemy.\nWhen DMG dealt by Skill triggers CRIT Hit, there is a <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the target's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

100203.Name: Ethereal Dream
100203.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Dan Heng's ATK to one designated enemy target. If the attacked enemy is Slowed, the multiplier for the DMG dealt by Ultimate increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
100203.SimpleDesc: Deals massive Wind DMG to one enemy. If the enemy is Slowed, DMG multiplier dealt will be increased.

100204.Name: Superiority of Reach
100204.Desc: When Dan Heng becomes the target of an ally's ability, his next attack's Wind <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can be triggered again after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
100204.SimpleDesc: When this unit becomes the target of an ally's ability, this unit's next attack's <color=#f29e38ff>Wind <u>RES PEN</u> increases</color>. This effect can be triggered again after 2 turns.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

100206.Name: Attack
100206.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100207.Name: Splitting Spearhead
100207.Desc: After Dan Heng uses his Technique, his ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> at the start of the next battle for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
100207.SimpleDesc: After they use their Technique, their ATK is increased at the start of the next battle.

1.PointDesc: When current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower, reduces the chance of being attacked by enemies.
After launching an attack, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to increase this unit's SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000002.Name: Fixed Chance
30000002.Desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

1.PointDesc: Basic ATK deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to Slowed enemies.

1003.Name: Himeko
1003.Desc: The one who repaired the Astral Express.\nTo witness the vast starry sky, she decided to travel with the Astral Express.\nHer hobby is brewing hand-made coffee.

1.Name: Childhood
1.Desc: After "Victory Rush" is triggered, Himeko's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

2.Name: Convergence
2.Desc: Deals <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> more DMG to enemies whose HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or less.

3.Name: Poised
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Dedication
4.Desc: When Himeko's Skill inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, she gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra point(s) of Charge.

5.Name: Aspiration
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

100302.Name: Molten Detonation
100302.Desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to one designated enemy and Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
100302.SimpleDesc: Deals Fire DMG to one enemy and minor Fire DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

100303.Name: Heavenly Flare
100303.Desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko's ATK to all enemies. Himeko regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> extra Energy for each enemy defeated.

100304.Name: Victory Rush
100304.Desc: When an enemy is inflicted with Weakness Break, Himeko gains 1 point of Charge (max <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points).\nIf Himeko is fully Charged when an ally performs an attack, Himeko immediately performs 1 <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> and deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to all enemies, consuming all Charge points.\nAt the start of the battle, Himeko gains 1 point of Charge.
100304.SimpleDesc: At the start of battle or when an enemy's Weakness is Broken, gains Charge.\nAfter any ally target performs an attack, if fully Charged, <color=#f29e38ff>launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> and deals Fire DMG to <color=#f29e38ff>all enemies</color>, consuming all Charge points.

10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

After entering battle with enemies in the Special Dimension, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase Fire DMG taken by enemies by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.

1004.Name: Welt

The <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt when using Basic ATK is equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Basic ATK DMG multiplier. The <u>Additional DMG</u> dealt when using Skill is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Skill DMG multiplier.

3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

1014.Name: Saber

Alas, the knight-king of Camelot has yet to reach that ever-distant utopia.\nThough still a young maiden, she has heeded the call for this most unique iteration of the Holy Grail War. With the Sword in the Stone offering its choice once more, how shall she shatter the illusions of the past?\n— "The wishes I did not fulfill will end here."

Upon entering battle, Luka deals Physical DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his ATK to a random single enemy with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict his Skill's Bleed effect on the target. Then, Luka gains 1 additional stack of Fighting Will.
111107.SimpleDesc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor Physical DMG to a random single enemy, with a high chance to inflict <color=#f29e38ff>Bleed</color> to the target. Then, gains 1 stack of Fighting Will.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

111108.Name: Sky-Shatter Fist
111108.Desc: Consumes 2 stacks of "Fighting Will." First, uses "Direct Punch" to deal 3 hits, with each hit dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Luka's ATK to one designated enemy target.\nThen, uses "Rising Uppercut" to deal 1 hit, dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Luka's ATK to the designated enemy target.
111108.SimpleDesc: Consumes 2 stacks of "Fighting Will" to deal Physical DMG to one enemy.

1.PointDesc: When using Skill, immediately dispels <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>buff(s)</u> from the enemy target.

10000009.Name: Buff
10000009.Desc: Can buff combat ability for a period of time, which can be dispelled unless otherwise specified.

1.PointDesc: For every stack of Fighting Will obtained, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

When using Enhanced Basic ATK, every hit of "Direct Punch" has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> for Luka to use 1 additional hit. This effect does not apply to additional hits generated in this way.

30000002.Name: Fixed Chance
30000002.Desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

1112.Name: Topaz & Numby
1112.Desc:
Topaz is the Leader of the Special Debts Picket Team and high-level manager of the Strategic Investment Department under the Interastral Peace Corporation.
A member of the "Ten Stonehearts" at a young age, Topaz's foundational expertise is "debt retrieval."
Her partner, the Warp Trotter "Numby," is also capable of keenly perceiving where "riches" are located, ensuring that jobs based in security, debt collection, and actuarial varieties are of no great challenge.
At presently they are traveling the cosmos together, seeking all manner of liability disputes that might be affecting the stable progression of the IPC's businesses.

1.Name: Future Market
1.Desc: When enemies afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receive <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u>, they will enter the "Debtor" state. This can take effect only once within a single attack.\nThe "Debtor" state increases the CRIT DMG of <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u> inflicted on the target enemies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s). When "Proof of Debt" is removed, the "Debtor" state is also removed.

10000004.Name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

2.Name: Bona Fide Acquisition
2.Desc: After Numby takes action and launches an attack, Topaz regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

3.Name: Seize the Big and Free the Small
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Agile Operation
4.Desc: After Numby's turn begins, Topaz's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

5.Name: Inflationary Demand
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Incentive Mechanism
6.Desc: Numby's attack count during the "Windfall Bonanza!" state increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, and its Fire <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> when it attacks.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

111201.Name: Deficit...
111201.Desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Topaz's ATK to one designated enemy.
111201.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Fire DMG to an enemy.

111202.Name: Difficulty Paying?
111202.Desc: Inflicts one designated enemy target with a "Proof of Debt" state, increasing the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> DMG it receives by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. "Proof of Debt" only takes effect on the most recent target it is applied to. If there are no enemies inflicted with "Proof of Debt" on the field when an ally's turn starts or when an ally takes action, Topaz will inflict a random enemy with "Proof of Debt."\nNumby deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Topaz's ATK to this target. Using this Skill to deal DMG is considered as launching a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>.
111202.SimpleDesc: Inflicts one enemy with a "Proof of Debt" state and causes it to <color=#f29e38ff>receive increased Follow-Up ATK DMG</color>. Numby deals Fire DMG to the target.

10000004.Name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

111203.Name: Turn a Profit!
111203.Desc: Numby enters the Windfall Bonanza! state and its DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Also, when enemies with Proof of Debt are hit by an ally's Basic ATK, Skill, or Ultimate, Numby's action is Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Numby exits the Windfall Bonanza! state after using <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> attacks.
111203.SimpleDesc: Numby enters the Windfall Bonanza! state and <color=#f29e38ff>increases its DMG multiplier and CRIT DMG</color>.

111204.Name: Trotter Market!?
111204.Desc: Summons Numby at the start of battle. Numby has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> SPD by default. When taking action, Numby launches <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u> on one enemy target afflicted with "Proof of Debt," dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Topaz's ATK.\nWhen enemies afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receive an ally's Follow-Up ATKs, Numby's action is Advanced Forward by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. The action Advance Forward effect cannot be triggered during Numby's own turn.\nWhen Topaz is <u>downed</u>, Numby disappears.
111204.SimpleDesc: At the start of the battle, <color=#f29e38ff>summons Numby</color>. When Numby takes action, it <color=#f29e38ff>launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on a target afflicted with "Proof of Debt"</color>, dealing Fire DMG.\nWhen an enemy afflicted with "Proof of Debt" receives <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, Numby's <color=#f29e38ff>action advances</color>.

10000004.Name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

111206.Name: Attack
111206.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

111207.Name: Explicit Subsidy
111207.Desc:
Summons Numby when Topaz enters the overworld. Numby will automatically search for Basic Treasures and Trotters within a set radius.
Using her Technique will regenerate <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for Topaz after Numby's first attack in the next battle.
If Topaz is still in the team after using her Technique and defeating overworld enemies, a small bonus amount of credits will be added to the earned credits. A maximum of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> bonus credits can be received per calendar day.
After using her Technique and defeating enemies in Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, additionally receive a small amount of Cosmic Fragments with a small chance to obtain 1 random Curio.
111207.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Summons Numby to tag along</color> in a map. Numby will automatically <color=#f29e38ff>search for Basic Treasures and Trotters nearby</color>. Using Technique will regenerate Energy for Topaz after Numby's first attack in the next battle.

1.PointDesc: When Topaz uses Basic ATK to deal DMG, it is considered as a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>.

10000004.Name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

1.PointDesc: Increases Topaz & Numby's DMG dealt to enemy targets with Fire Weakness by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
After Numby uses an attack while in the Windfall Bonanza! state, Topaz additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

1201.Name: Qingque
1201.Desc: Diviner of the Divination Commission on the Xianzhou Luofu, and a librarian.\nAlways slacks off and is about to be demoted to a "door guardian."

1.Name: Rise Through the Tiles
1.Desc: Ultimate deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG.

2.Name: Sleep on the Tiles
2.Desc: Every time Draw Tile is triggered, Qingque immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

3.Name: Read Between the Tiles
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: Right on the Tiles
4.Desc: After using Skill, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to gain "Self-Sufficer," lasting until the end of the current turn. \nWhile "Self-Sufficer" is active, using Basic ATK or Enhanced Basic ATK immediately launches 1 <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> on the same target, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>100%</unbreak> of Basic ATK DMG or Enhanced Basic ATK DMG.

10000004.Name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

30000002.Name: Fixed Chance
30000002.Desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

5.Name: Gambit for the Tiles
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Prevail Beyond the Tiles
6.Desc: Recovers 1 Skill Point after using Enhanced Basic ATK.

120101.Name: Flower Pick
120101.Desc: Tosses 1 jade tile from the suit with the fewest tiles in hand to deal Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to one designated enemy.
120101.SimpleDesc: Tosses a tile to deal minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

120102.Name: A Scoop of Moon
120102.Desc: Immediately draws <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> jade tile(s) and increases DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> until the end of the current turn. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). The turn will not end after this Skill is used.
120102.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Draws tiles</color> and increases DMG dealt. <color=#f29e38ff>This turn does not end</color> after this action.

120103.Name: A Quartet? Woo-hoo!
120103.Desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to all enemies, and obtains 4 jade tiles of the same suit.
120103.SimpleDesc: Deals Quantum DMG to all enemies, then obtains 4 tiles of the same suit.

120104.Name: Celestial Jade
120104.Desc: When an ally's turn starts, Qingque randomly draws 1 tile from 3 different suits and can hold up to 4 tiles at one time.\nIf Qingque starts her turn with 4 tiles of the same suit, she consumes all tiles to enter the "Hidden Hand" state.\nWhile in this state, Qingque cannot use her Skill again. At the same time, Qingque's ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and her Basic ATK "Flower Pick" is enhanced, becoming "Cherry on Top!" The "Hidden Hand" state ends after using "Cherry on Top!".
120104.SimpleDesc: At the start of any ally's turn, draws a tile. At the start of this character's turn, if this character holds 4 tiles from the same suit, remove all tiles in possession and <color=#f29e38ff>Enhance this Basic ATK</color> while increasing this character's ATK.

120106.Name: Attack
120106.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120107.Name: Game Solitaire
120107.Desc: After using Technique, Qingque draws <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> jade tile(s) when the battle starts.
120107.SimpleDesc: After they use their Technique, draw tile(s) at the start of the next battle.

120108.Name: Cherry on Top!
120108.Desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to one designated enemy, and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Qingque's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.\n"Cherry on Top!" cannot recover Skill Points.
120108.SimpleDesc: Deals Quantum DMG to one enemy and minor Quantum DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

1.PointDesc: Restores 1 Skill Point when using the Skill. This effect can only be triggered 1 time per battle.
Using the Skill increases DMG Boost effect of attacks by an extra <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
Qingque's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for 1 turn after using the Enhanced Basic ATK.

1202.Name: Tingyun
1202.Desc: Amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission of the Xianzhou Luofu.\nShe travels with business delegates, forging trade relationships and alliances with many worlds.

1.Name: Windfall of Lucky Springs
1.Desc: After using their Ultimate, the ally with Benediction gains a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> increase in SPD for 1 turn.

2.Name: Gainfully Gives, Givingly Gains
2.Desc: The ally with Benediction regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy after defeating an enemy. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

3.Name: Halcyon Bequest
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Jovial Versatility
4.Desc: The DMG multiplier provided by Benediction increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Sauntering Coquette
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Peace Brings Wealth to All
6.Desc: Ultimate regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> more Energy for the target ally.

120201.Name: Dislodged
120201.Desc: Tingyun deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to one designated enemy.
120201.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

120202.Name: Soothing Melody
120202.Desc: Grants a single ally with Benediction to increase their ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Tingyun's current ATK.\nWhen the ally with Benediction attacks, they will deal Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of that ally's ATK for 1 time.\nBenediction lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and is only effective on the most recent receiver of Tingyun's Skill.
120202.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Increases the ATK</color> of a single ally and grants them Benediction. Ally with Benediction additionally deals minor <color=#f29e38ff>Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u></color> when attacking.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

120203.Name: Amidst the Rejoicing Clouds
120203.Desc: Regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for a single ally and increases the target's DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
120203.SimpleDesc: Regenerates a target ally's <color=#f29e38ff>Energy</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>increases their DMG dealt</color>.

120204.Name: Violet Sparknado
120204.Desc: When an enemy is attacked by Tingyun, the ally with Benediction immediately deals Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of that ally's ATK to the same enemy.
120204.SimpleDesc: When an enemy is attacked by Tingyun, the ally with Benediction immediately deals minor Lightning <u>Additional DMG</u> to the same enemy.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

120206.Name: Attack
120206.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120207.Name: Gentle Breeze
120207.Desc: Tingyun immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy upon using her Technique.
120207.SimpleDesc: After using this Technique, this character immediately regenerates Energy for themselves.

1.PointDesc: Tingyun's SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for 1 turn after using Skill.
Tingyun immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy at the start of her turn.
DMG dealt by Basic ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

1203.Name: Luocha
1203.Desc: Carrying a coffin wherever he goes, he is a foreign trader who came from beyond the stellar seas.\nHas excellent medical skills.

1.Name: Ablution of the Quick
1.Desc: While the Zone is active, ATK of all allies increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.Name: Bestowal From the Pure
2.Desc: When his Skill is triggered, if the target ally's HP percentage is lower than <unbreak>50%</unbreak>, Luocha's Outgoing Healing increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. If the target ally's HP percentage is at <unbreak>50%</unbreak> or higher, the ally receives a Shield that can absorb DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Luocha's ATK plus <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turns.

3.Name: Surveyal by the Fool
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Heavy Lies the Crown
4.Desc: When Luocha's Zone is active, enemies become Weakened and deal <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> less DMG.

5.Name: Cicatrix 'Neath the Pain
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Reunion With the Dust
6.Desc: When Ultimate is used, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to reduce all enemies' All-Type RES by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

30000002.Name: Fixed Chance
30000002.Desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

120301.Name: Thorns of the Abyss
120301.Desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Luocha's ATK to one designated enemy.
120301.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one enemy.

120302.Name: Prayer of Abyss Flower
120302.Desc: After using his Skill, Luocha immediately restores the target ally's HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Luocha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>. Meanwhile, Luocha gains 1 stack of Abyss Flower.\nWhen any ally's HP percentage drops to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> or lower, an effect equivalent to Luocha's Skill will immediately be triggered and applied to this ally for one time (without consuming Skill Points). This effect can be triggered again after <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
120302.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Restores</color> a single ally's HP and gains 1 stack of Abyss Flower.

120303.Name: Death Wish
120303.Desc: Removes <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>buff(s)</u> from all enemies and deals all enemies Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Luocha's ATK. At the same time, Luocha gains 1 stack of Abyss Flower.
120303.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Removes</color> 1 <color=#f29e38ff><u>buff</u></color> from all enemies, deals Imaginary DMG to all enemies, and gains 1 stack of Abyss Flower.

10000009.Name: Buff
10000009.Desc: Can buff combat ability for a period of time, which can be dispelled unless otherwise specified.

120304.Name: Cycle of Life
120304.Desc: When Abyss Flower reaches <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stacks, Luocha consumes all stacks of Abyss Flower to deploy a Zone against the enemy.\nWhen any enemy in the Zone is attacked by an ally, the attacking ally's HP is immediately restored by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Luocha's ATK plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.\nThe Zone's effect lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turns. When Luocha is <u>knocked down</u>, the Zone will be dispelled.
120304.SimpleDesc: Deploys a <color=#f29e38ff>Zone</color> when Abyss Flower reaches 2 stacks. While the Zone is active, allies will <color=#f29e38ff>restore HP after they attack</color>.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

120306.Name: Attack
120306.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120307.Name: Mercy of a Fool
120307.Desc: After the Technique is used, the Talent will be immediately triggered at the start of the next battle.
120307.SimpleDesc: After the Technique is used, immediately trigger the effect of the Talent at the start of the next battle.

1.PointDesc: When Skill's effect is triggered, dispel <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from one designated ally.

10000010.Name: Debuff
10000010.Desc: Debuffs are negative status effects that render units weaker. Unless otherwise specified, debuffs can be dispelled.

1.PointDesc: When any enemy in the Zone is attacked by an ally, all allies (except the attacker) restore HP equal to <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak> of Luocha's ATK plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.
Increases the chance to resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

1204.Name: Jing Yuan
1204.Desc: The Divine Foresight, one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals of the Xianzhou Alliance, leads the Cloud Knights of the Xianzhou Luofu.\nA student of the Luofu's previous Sword Champion, though not known for his martial prowess.

1.Name: Slash, Seas Split
1.Desc: When Lightning-Lord attacks, the DMG multiplier on enemies adjacent to the target enemy increases by an extra amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the DMG multiplier against the primary target enemy.

2.Name: Swing, Skies Squashed
2.Desc: After Lightning-Lord takes action, DMG dealt by Jing Yuan's Basic ATK, Skill, and Ultimate increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.Name: Strike, Suns Subdued
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Spin, Stars Sieged
4.Desc: For each hit performed by the Lightning-Lord when it takes action, Jing Yuan regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

5.Name: Stride, Spoils Seized
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Sweep, Souls Slain
6.Desc: Each hit performed by the Lightning-Lord when it takes action will make the target enemy Vulnerable.\nWhile Vulnerable, enemies receive <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG until the end of the Lightning-Lord's current turn, stacking up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

120401.Name: Glistening Light
120401.Desc: Jing Yuan deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of his ATK to one designated enemy.
120401.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

120402.Name: Rifting Zenith
120402.Desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jing Yuan's ATK to all enemies and increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for the next turn.
120402.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action</color>.

120403.Name: Lightbringer
120403.Desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jing Yuan's ATK to all enemies and increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for the next turn.
120403.SimpleDesc: Deals Lightning DMG to all enemies and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action</color>.

120404.Name: Prana Extirpated
120404.Desc:
Summons Lightning-Lord at the start of the battle. Lightning-Lord has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> base SPD and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> base Hits Per Action. When the Lightning-Lord takes action, its hits are considered as <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u>, with each hit dealing Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Jing Yuan's ATK to a random single enemy, and enemies adjacent to it also receive Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of the DMG dealt to the primary target enemy.
The Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action can reach a max of <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>. Every time Lightning-Lord's Hits Per Action increases by 1, its SPD increases by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>. After the Lightning-Lord's action ends, its SPD and Hits Per Action return to their base values.
When Jing Yuan is <u>knocked down</u>, the Lightning-Lord will disappear.
When Jing Yuan is affected by <u>Crowd Control debuff</u>, the Lightning-Lord is unable to take action.
120404.SimpleDesc: At the start of the battle, summons "Lightning-Lord." When "Lightning-Lord" takes action, launches <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> to <color=#f29e38ff>automatically</color> <color=#f29e38ff>deal minor Lightning DMG</color> to one random enemy and adjacent targets.

At the start of the battle, immediately regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

The tally value will be reset and re-accumulated after his Ultimate has been used.

2.Desc: If any ally target is struck by a killing blow while "Matrix of Prescience" is active, then all ally targets who were struck by a killing blow during this action will not be <u>knocked down</u>, and <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP is immediately restored. This effect can trigger 1 time per battle.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

3.Name: Apex Nexus
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: Fortuna Stellaris
4.Desc: When other allies under Matrix of Prescience are attacked, Fu Xuan regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

5.Name: Arbiter Primus
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Omnia Vita
6.Desc: Once Matrix of Prescience is activated, it will keep a tally of the total HP lost by all team members in the current battle. The DMG dealt by Fu Xuan's Ultimate will increase by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of this tally of HP loss.\nThis tally is also capped at <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Fu Xuan's Max HP and the tally value will reset and re-accumulate after Fu Xuan's Ultimate is used.

120801.Name: Novaburst
120801.Desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fu Xuan's Max HP to one designated enemy.
120801.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy.

120802.Name: Known by Stars, Shown by Hearts
120802.Desc: Activates Matrix of Prescience, via which Fu Xuan's teammates will <u>Distribute</u> <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the DMG they receive (before this DMG is mitigated by any Shields) to Fu Xuan for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile affected by Matrix of Prescience, all ally targets gain the Knowledge effect, which increases their respective Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Fu Xuan's Max HP, and increases CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>.\nWhen Fu Xuan is <u>knocked down</u>, the Matrix of Prescience will be dispelled.
120802.SimpleDesc: Activates Matrix of Prescience. <color=#f29e38ff>DMG received by Fu Xuan's teammates is <u>Distributed</u></color> to her. Also <color=#f29e38ff>increases CRIT Rate</color> and Max HP of all allies.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000013.Name: Distribute
10000013.Desc: Before DMG is calculated, distribute a part of the attacking unit's DMG to another target (or multiple other targets), with the target hit by the attack taking the rest of the DMG. DMG distributed to other targets cannot be distributed again.

120803.Name: Woes of Many Morphed to One
120803.Desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fu Xuan's Max HP to all enemies and obtains 1 trigger count for the HP Restore effect granted by Fu Xuan's Talent.
120803.SimpleDesc: Deals Quantum DMG to all enemies and increases Fu Xuan's Talent trigger count.

120804.Name: Bleak Breeds Bliss
120804.Desc: While Fu Xuan is still active in battle, Misfortune Avoidance is applied to the entire team. With Misfortune Avoidance, allies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> less DMG.\nWhen Fu Xuan's current HP percentage falls to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of her Max HP or less, HP Restore will be triggered for Fu Xuan, restoring her HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the amount of HP she is currently missing. This effect cannot be triggered if she receives a killing blow. This effect has 1 trigger count by default and can hold up to a maximum of 2 trigger counts.
120804.SimpleDesc: While Fu Xuan is still active in battle, the DMG taken by all team members is reduced.\nWhen her HP is low, <color=#f29e38ff>automatically</color> <color=#f29e38ff>restores her own HP</color> based on the HP percentage already lost. This effect can have up to 2 trigger counts at any given time.

120806.Name: Attack
120806.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

120807.Name: Of Fortune Comes Fate
120807.Desc: After the Technique is used, all team members receive a Barrier, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. This Barrier can block all enemy attacks, and the team will not enter battle when attacked. Entering battle while the Barrier is active will have Fu Xuan automatically activate Matrix of Prescience at the start of the battle, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
120807.SimpleDesc: Activates a Barrier. Allies will not enter battle when attacked by enemies. Entering battle will automatically activate Matrix of Prescience.

1.PointDesc: When Matrix of Prescience is active, Fu Xuan will regenerate <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra Energy when she uses her Skill.
When Fu Xuan's Ultimate is used, heals all other allies by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Fu Xuan's Max HP plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

If a target enemy applies <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> to allies while the "Matrix of Prescience" is active, all allies will resist all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> applied by the enemy target during the current action. This effect can only be triggered once. When "Matrix of Prescience" is activated again, the number of times this effect can be triggered will reset.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

10000009.Name: Buff

120904.Name: One With the Sword
120904.Desc: When Soulsteel Sync is active, Yanqing is less likely to be attacked by enemies. Yanqing's CRIT Rate increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> and his CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Yanqing attacks an enemy, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>fixed chance</u> to launch <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK to the enemy, which has a <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Freeze the enemy for 1 turn.\nThe Frozen target cannot take action and receives Ice <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yanqing's ATK at the beginning of each turn.\nWhen Yanqing receives DMG, the Soulsteel Sync effect will disappear.

120906.Name: Attack

30000001.Name: Base Chance

After entering battle, deals DMG for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s), dealing Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Guinaifen's ATK to a random single enemy target each time, with a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting Firekiss on them.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

Bailu then heals random allies <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s). After each healing, HP restored from the next healing is reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

Invigoration can trigger <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> more time(s).
Characters with Invigoration receive <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> less DMG.

1212.Name: Jingliu
1212.Desc: Former Sword Champion of the Luofu, and the creator of the Cloud Knights' legends of undefeated might.\nNow, her name has been wiped from the records, and she is a traitor of the Xianzhou walking on the fine line between sanity and mara-struck.

1.Name: Moon Crashes Tianguan Gate
1.Desc: When using her Ultimate or Enhanced Skill, Jingliu's CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). If only one enemy target is attacked, the target will additionally be dealt Ice DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Jingliu's ATK.

5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Desc: When Jingliu enters the Spectral Transmigration state, the Syzygy stack limit increases by 1, and Jingliu obtains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Syzygy. While she is in the Spectral Transmigration state, her CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Syzygy" after attack ends.

1221.Name: Yunli
1221.Desc: A sword hunter from the Xianzhou Zhuming and "the Flaming Heart" General Huaiyan's darling granddaughter. Frank and straightforward.\nShe has learned swordplay and forging from Huaiyan since she was young, and thus is the second-youngest prodigy swordmaster of the Flamewheel Octet.\nFueled by an intense loathing for the cursed swords that emerged from the Zhuming, she vowed to "hunt down and wipe out all cursed swords."

"Intuit: Cull": Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yunli's ATK to the target, and deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yunli's ATK to adjacent targets. Then, additionally deals <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> instances of DMG, each dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of Yunli's ATK to a random single enemy.

When Yunli deals DMG via this ability, it's considered as dealing Ultimate DMG.

10000014.Name: Break DMG
10000014.Desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

130306.Name: Attack
130306.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130307.Name: Silken Serenade

At the start of the next battle, automatically triggers the Skill for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) without consuming Skill Points.\nIn Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, when Ruan Mei has Silken Serenade, the team actively attacking enemies will always be regarded as attacking their Weakness to enter battle, and this attack can reduce all enemies' Toughness regardless of Weakness types. When breaking Weakness, triggers Weakness Break Effect corresponding to the attacker's Type. For every Blessing in possession (up to a max of <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Blessings will be taken into account), additionally increases the Toughness Reduction of this attack by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. After breaking an enemy target's Weakness, additionally deals to the enemy target Break DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Ruan Mei's Ice Break DMG.
130307.SimpleDesc: The next time entering battle, automatically triggers the Skill for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). After using the Technique, allies attacking enemies in Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe will always be regarded as attacking their Weakness to enter battle, and their Toughness is reduced <color=#f29e38ff>regardless of Weakness types</color>. For every Blessing in possession, increases Toughness Reduction and additionally deals Break DMG when breaking Weakness.

1.PointDesc: Increases Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for all allies.
Ruan Mei regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy at the start of her turn.

In battle, for every <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Ruan Mei's Break Effect that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, her Skill additionally increases allies' DMG by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a maximum of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

1304.Name: Aventurine
1304.Desc: A high-ranking executive of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department.\nA risk-taker, his constant smile makes it difficult for people to discern his true feelings.

After using the Ultimate, provides all allies with a Fortified Wager shield, whose Shield Effect is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the one provided by the Skill, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

Upon reaching 7 points of "Blind Bet," Aventurine consumes the 7 points to launch a <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>-hit <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, with each hit dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Aventurine's DEF to one random enemy. "Blind Bet" is capped at <unbreak>10</unbreak> points.
130404.SimpleDesc: For any single ally with Fortified Wager, their Effect RES increases, and when they get attacked, Aventurine accumulates Blind Bet. When Aventurine has Fortified Wager, he can resist <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. Upon reaching 7 points of Blind Bet, Aventurine consumes the 7 points to launch a <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color> that deals minor Imaginary DMG to random single enemy targets, bouncing a total of 7 times.

There is a high chance for DEF to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

After Aventurine launches his Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, provides all ally targets with a Fortified Wager that can block DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Aventurine's DEF plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, and additionally grants a Fortified Wager that can block DMG equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of Aventurine's DEF plus <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> to the ally with the lowest Shield Effect, lasting for 3 turns.

1306.Name: Sparkle

At the same time, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on the target enemy and the adjacent targets. Additionally, there is a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of reducing the DEF of the target enemy and the adjacent targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

130703.Name: Bliss of <unbreak>Otherworld's Embrace</unbreak>
130703.Desc: Inflicts Epiphany on all enemies for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile afflicted with Epiphany, enemies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG in their turn. Additionally, if enemies are also inflicted with <u>Arcana</u>, they are considered to be simultaneously afflicted with Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, and Shock. After <u>Arcana</u> causes DMG at the start of each turn, its stacks are not reset. This non-reset effect of <u>Arcana</u> stacks can be triggered up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s) for the duration of Epiphany. And the trigger count resets when Epiphany is applied again.\nDeals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to all enemies.

Additionally, <color=#f29e38ff>having <u>Arcana</u> is regarded as having Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, and Shock</color>. Furthermore, <u>Arcana</u> will not reset its stacks after causing DMG at the start of the next turn. Deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

130704.Name: Loom of Fate's Caprice
130704.Desc:
Every time an enemy target receives DoT at the start of each turn, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> for it to be inflicted with 1 stack of <u>Arcana</u>.
While afflicted with <u>Arcana</u>, enemy targets receive Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK at the start of each turn. Each stack of <u>Arcana</u> increases this DMG multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>. Then <u>Arcana</u> resets to 1 stack. <u>Arcana</u> can stack up to <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> times.
Only when <u>Arcana</u> causes DMG at the start of an enemy target's turn, Black Swan triggers additional effects based on the number of <u>Arcana</u> stacks inflicted on the target:
When there are <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> or more <u>Arcana</u> stacks, deals Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to adjacent targets, with a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of <u>Arcana</u> on adjacent targets.
When there are <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> or more <u>Arcana</u> stacks, enables the current DoT dealt this time to ignore <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak> of the target's and adjacent targets' DEF.
130704.SimpleDesc: When an enemy target receives DoT at the start of each turn, there is a chance for it to be inflicted with <u>Arcana</u>. They receive <color=#f29e38ff>Wind DoT</color> at the start of the turn, and Black Swan triggers <color=#f29e38ff>additional effects</color> based on the number of <u>Arcana</u> stacks.

130707.Name: From Façade to Vérité

This process repeats until <u>Arcana</u> fails to be inflicted on this target. For each successive application of <u>Arcana</u> on a target, its <u>base chance</u> of success is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the <u>base chance</u> of the previous successful infliction of <u>Arcana</u> on that target.

Sequentially unleash "Rainblade" 3 times and "Stygian Resurge" 1 time, dealing Lightning DMG up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of Acheron's ATK to one designated enemy target, as well as Lightning DMG up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of Acheron's ATK to other targets.
"Rainblade": Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Acheron's ATK to one designated enemy target and removes up to 3 stacks of "Crimson Knot" from the target. When "Crimson Knot" is removed, immediately deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Acheron's ATK to all enemies. For every stack of "Crimson Knot" removed, this DMG Multiplier is additionally increased, up to a maximum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>.
"Stygian Resurge": Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Acheron's ATK to all enemies and remove all "Crimson Knots."
"Crimson Knot" cannot be applied to enemies during the Ultimate.

This effect can only trigger once for every ability use.\nAfter an enemy target exits the field or gets defeated by any unit while Acheron is on the field, their Crimson Knot stacks will be transferred to the enemy target with the most Crimson Knot stacks on the whole field.

During the Ultimate, reduces enemies' Toughness <color=#f29e38ff>regardless of Weakness Types</color> and reduces all enemies' <color=#f29e38ff>All-Type RES</color>.\nWhen any unit inflicts debuffs on an enemy target while using their ability, Acheron gains Slashed Dream and inflicts Crimson Knot on an enemy target.

When not hitting enemies, no Technique Points are consumed.

And when Stygian Resurge triggers, additionally deals DMG for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> times. Each time deals Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of Acheron's ATK to a single random enemy and is considered as Ultimate DMG.

130903.Name: Vox Harmonique, Opus Cosmique

Robin enters the "Concerto" state and makes all teammates (i.e., excluding this unit) immediately take action.

2.Desc: When in Standoff and gaining Pocket Trickshot, recovers <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) and increases Break Effect by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Can also trigger this effect when gaining Pocket Trickshot stacks that exceed the max limit. But cannot trigger repeatedly within one turn.

3.Name: Marble Orchard's Guard
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Cold Cuts Chef
4.Desc: When the enemy target in the Standoff is attacked by Boothill, the DMG they receive additionally increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When Boothill is attacked by the enemy target in the Standoff, the effect of him receiving increased DMG is offset by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Stump Speech
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Crowbar Hotel's Raccoon
6.Desc: When triggering the Talent's <u>Break DMG</u>, additionally deals <u>Break DMG</u> to the target equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG multiplier and additionally deals <u>Break DMG</u> to adjacent targets equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the original DMG multiplier.

10000014.Name: Break DMG
10000014.Desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

131501.Name: Skullcrush Spurs
131501.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's ATK to one designated enemy target.
131501.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

131502.Name: Sizzlin' Tango
131502.Desc:
Forces Boothill and one designated enemy target into the "Standoff" state. Boothill's Basic ATK gets Enhanced, and he cannot use his Skill, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Boothill's every turn.
The enemy target in the "Standoff" becomes Taunted. When this enemy target/Boothill gets attacked by the other party in the Standoff, the DMG they receive increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
After this target is defeated or becomes Weakness Broken, Boothill gains 1 stack of "Pocket Trickshot," then dispels the "Standoff."
This Skill cannot regenerate Energy. After using this Skill, the current turn does not end.
131502.SimpleDesc: Initiates <color=#f29e38ff>Standoff</color>. After the target in the Standoff is <color=#f29e38ff>defeated or Weakness Broken</color>, Boothill receives Pocket Trickshot and dispels the Standoff. Boothill <color=#f29e38ff>gains Enhanced Basic ATK</color> and this turn does not end.

131503.Name: Dust Devil's Sunset Rodeo
131503.Desc: Applies Physical Weakness to one designated enemy target, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nDeals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's ATK to the target and <u>delays their action</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
131503.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Applies Physical Weakness</color> to one enemy, deals massive Physical DMG to them, and <u>delays their action</u>.

10000002.Name: Action Delayed
10000002.Desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

131504.Name: Five Peas in a Pod
131504.Desc: Each stack of Pocket Trickshot increases the Enhanced Basic Attack's Toughness Reduction by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>, stacking up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s).\nIf the target is <u>Weakness Broken</u> while the Enhanced Basic ATK is being used, based on the number of Pocket Trickshot stacks, deals <u>Break DMG</u> to this target equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's Physical Break DMG. The max Toughness taken into account for this DMG cannot exceed <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> times the base Toughness Reduction of the Basic Attack "Skullcrush Spurs."\nAfter winning the battle, Boothill can retain Pocket Trickshot for the next battle.
131504.SimpleDesc: Pocket Trickshot increases the Enhanced Basic ATK's Toughness Reduction and additionally deals Physical <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color> <color=#f29e38ff>if the target is Weakness Broken</color>. After winning the battle, retains Pocket Trickshot for the next battle.

10000006.Name: Weakness Break State
10000006.Desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

10000014.Name: Break DMG
10000014.Desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

131506.Name: Attack
131506.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

131507.Name: 3-9× Smile
131507.Desc: After the Technique is used, when casting the Skill for the first time in the next battle, applies the same Physical Weakness to the target as the one induced by the Ultimate, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
131507.SimpleDesc: After the Technique is used, <color=#f29e38ff>inflicts Physical Weakness</color> on one enemy when casting the Skill for the first time in the next battle.

131508.Name: Fanning the Hammer
131508.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Boothill's ATK to one designated enemy target.\nThe Enhanced Basic Attack cannot recover Skill Points and can only target the enemy that is in the "Standoff" state.
131508.SimpleDesc: Deals Physical DMG to one enemy. Can only attack the target in the "Standoff."

1.PointDesc: Increase this character's CRIT Rate/CRIT DMG, by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Break Effect, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.
While Boothill is in the Standoff, reduces the DMG he receives from targets that are not in the Standoff by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
When in Standoff and gaining Pocket Trickshot, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. Can also trigger this effect when gaining Pocket Trickshot stacks that exceed the max limit.

1317.Name: Rappa
1317.Desc: A peculiar girl who appears in Penacony like a flashbang at the darkest hour of night, identifying herself as a ninja and attributing everything in the world to "ninjutsu."\nUpholding the recitation of ninja mantra, creating Dazzling Ninja Seals, and studying ninja scrolls — That is, the Way of the Ninja involves rap, graffiti, and manga — Through rigorous self-discipline, she roams the stars, upholding justice and righteousness.\nAs a member of the Galaxy Rangers, she relentlessly pursues the villain known as Evil Ninja Osaru, chasing them to the very edge of the Cosmos.

1.Name: Returned Is the Revenant With No Ferry Toll
1.Desc: During the "Sealform" state entered by using Ultimate, DMG dealt by Rappa ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the targets' DEF. After exiting the "Sealform" state, regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.

2.Name: Free Is the Mind Enlightened by Haikus
2.Desc: The Enhanced Basic ATK's first 2 hits have their Toughness Reduction against the one designated enemy increased by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

3.Name: Many Are the Shrines That Repel No Hell
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: Lost Is the Nindō Devoured by Time
4.Desc: While in the "Sealform" state, increases all allies' SPD by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Steady Is The Ranger With Unerring Arrows
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Righteous Is the Wrath That Spares No Evil
6.Desc: When battle starts, Rappa gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of her Talent's Charge, and its upper limit increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s). After launching the third hit of "Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade," gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge.

131701.Name: Ninjutsu: Rise Above Tumbles
131701.Desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rappa's ATK to one designated enemy.
131701.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy.

131702.Name: Ninja Strike: Rooted Resolute
131702.Desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rappa's ATK to all enemies.
131702.SimpleDesc: Deals Imaginary DMG to all enemies.

131703.Name: Nindō Supreme: Aishiteru
131703.Desc: Enters the "Sealform" state, immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u>, obtains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points of "Chroma Ink," and increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nWhile in the "Sealform" state, Basic ATK is enhanced, and Skill and Ultimate cannot be used. After using Enhanced Basic ATK, consumes 1 point of "Chroma Ink." When "Chroma Ink" is depleted, exits the "Sealform" state.
131703.SimpleDesc: Enters the "Sealform" state, gains an <color=#f29e38ff><u>extra turn</u></color>, obtains 3 points of "Chroma Ink," and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Weakness Break Efficiency and Break Effect</color>.\nWhile in the "Sealform" state, <color=#f29e38ff>gains Enhanced Basic ATK</color>. After using Enhanced Basic ATK, consumes 1 point of "Chroma Ink." When "Chroma Ink" is depleted, exits the "Sealform" state.

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

131704.Name: Ninja Tech: Endurance Gauge
131704.Desc: Each time the enemy target is Weakness Broken, Rappa gains 1 point of Charge, up to a max of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> points of Charge. When Rappa next launches the third hit of "Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade," additionally deals Break DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rappa's Imaginary Break DMG to all enemies. This DMG can ignore Weakness Type to reduce <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Toughness, consuming all Charge. Each point of Charge increases the Break DMG multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases the Toughness Reduction that can ignore Weakness Type by <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak>.\nWhen Breaking Weakness, triggers the Imaginary Weakness Break effect.
131704.SimpleDesc: When the enemy target is Weakness Broken, Rappa gains 1 point of Charge. When launching the third hit of "Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade," additionally deals Imaginary Break DMG to all enemies. This DMG can <color=#f29e38ff>ignore Weakness Type to reduce Toughness</color> and consume all Charge, increasing the Break DMG multiplier and Toughness Reduction.

131706.Name: Attack
131706.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

131707.Name: Ninja Dash: By Leaps and Bounds
131707.Desc: After using Technique, enters the "Graffiti" state for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. While in the "Graffiti" state, moves forward rapidly for a set distance and attacks any enemies touched. During the rapid movement, can block all enemies' attacks. Using an attack in the "Graffiti" state can end the state's duration early. After entering combat via attacking enemies, deals <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> Toughness Reduction regardless of Weakness Type and Break DMG equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Rappa's Imaginary Break DMG to each enemy target, and deals Break DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Rappa's Imaginary Break DMG to adjacent targets. At the same time, this unit regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy.
131707.SimpleDesc: Enters the "Graffiti" state. Moves forward rapidly for a set distance and attacks any enemies touched. After entering combat via attacking enemies, deals <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness Reduction regardless of Weakness Type</color> and Imaginary Break DMG to each enemy target and deals Imaginary Break DMG to their adjacent targets. At the same time, this unit regenerates Energy.

131708.Name: Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade
131708.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy and minor Imaginary DMG to adjacent targets. Attacking enemies without Imaginary Weakness can also reduce their Toughness.

131710.Name: Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade
131710.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy and minor Imaginary DMG to adjacent targets. Attacking enemies without Imaginary Weakness can also reduce their Toughness.

131712.Name: Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade
131712.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to all enemies. Attacking enemies without Imaginary Weakness can also reduce their Toughness.

131718.Name: Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade
131718.Desc: Launches "Ningu: Demonbane Petalblade." The first 2 hits deal Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rappa's ATK to one designated enemy and Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rappa's ATK to adjacent targets, and the 3rd hit deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Rappa's ATK to all enemies.\nEnhanced Basic ATK will not recover Skill Points. Attacking enemies that don't have Imaginary Weakness can also reduce Toughness, whose effect is equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of the original Toughness Reduction. When Breaking Weakness, triggers the Imaginary Weakness Break effect.
131718.SimpleDesc: The first 2 hits deal minor Imaginary DMG to one designated enemy and minor Imaginary DMG to adjacent targets. The third hit deals minor Imaginary DMG to all enemies. Attacking enemies without Imaginary Weakness can also reduce their Toughness.

1.PointDesc: When the Weakness of an elite-level or higher enemy is broken, Rappa additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Charge and regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

While in the "Sealform" state, after Rappa uses Enhanced Basic ATK to deal DMG to a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy target, converts the Toughness Reduction from this instance of DMG to 1 instance of <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>Super Break DMG</u>.

10000006.Name: Weakness Break State
10000006.Desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

1.PointDesc: When an enemy target becomes Weakness Broken, increases the <u>Break DMG</u> taken by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. If Rappa's current ATK is higher than <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, for every <unbreak>100</unbreak> excess ATK, additionally increases this value by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max additional increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. This effect lasts for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000014.Name: Break DMG
10000014.Desc: Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher target max Toughness, and higher character levels.\nBreak DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.

1321.Name: The Dahlia
1321.Desc: The sweet dream burned down the Ever-Flame Mansion, taking with it every trace of "her."\nDestruction, Remembrance... flowers of betrayal bloomed wherever they passed.\nTo return to the dreamscape no one remembers, who will be the one to set her aflame again?

1.Name: When a Bud Readies to Bloom
1.Desc: Applies Talent's <u>Super Break DMG</u> multiplier provided to "Dance Partner" to all ally characters, with "Dance Partner" additionally receiving a <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> boost. After "Dance Partner" uses an attack, deals an additional fixed amount of Toughness Reduction equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the enemy target's Max Toughness (minimum of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points, up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points). This effect can only trigger once per enemy target, and the trigger count for each target resets after the enemy target receives a killing blow.

10000015.Name: Super Break DMG
10000015.Desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

2.Name: Fresh, Ethereal, and Beloved
2.Desc: When The Dahlia is on the field, decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When an enemy target enters the field, immediately inflicts "Wilt" state on them, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.Name: Pity Its Petals Thin as Mist
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Pity Its Heart Gnawed by Worms
4.Desc: Increases the instances of DMG dealt by Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>, and every hit increases the target's DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10000004.Name: Follow-Up ATK
10000004.Desc: Unleashes an extra attack on the target. This effect is triggered automatically when requirements are met.

5.Name: Fallen, Decayed, and Despised
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: And Yet, Always, Deathly Beautiful
6.Desc: Increases "Dance Partner's" Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using her Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, <u>advances the next action of all "Dance Partners" </u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

132101.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

132102.Desc: Deploys a Zone that lasts for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s), with the Zone's duration decreasing by 1 at the start of The Dahlia's turn. Then, deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Dahlia's ATK to one designated enemy and their adjacent targets.\nWhile the Zone is active, increases all allies' Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. Toughness Reduction taken by enemy targets while not <u>Weakness Broken</u> can be converted into <u>Super Break DMG</u>.
132102.SimpleDesc: Deploys a Zone. Deals Fire DMG to one enemy and their adjacent targets.\nWhile the Zone is active, increases all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break Efficiency</color>, and enemy targets <color=#f29e38ff>will also take <u>Super Break DMG</u> even when not Weakness Broken</color>.

132103.Desc: Inflicts "Wilt" state on all enemies, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Then, deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Dahlia's ATK, which is distributed across all enemies.\nReduces DEF of enemy targets in the "Wilt" state by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> and applies Weakness of all "Dance Partners'" Types to enemy targets.
132103.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Applies Weakness of "Dance Partner's" Type</color> to all enemies and reduces their DEF. Deals massive Fire DMG, which is distributed across all enemies.

132104.Name: Who's Afraid of Constance?
132104.Desc: When entering combat, The Dahlia regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy and grants "Dance Partner" to this unit and the teammate who triggered combat. Whenever there is no other "Dance Partner" on the field, grants "Dance Partners" to this unit and the teammate with the highest Break Effect. After a "Dance Partner" attacks a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this attack is converted into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> at <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nAfter an enemy target is attacked by the other "Dance Partner," The Dahlia launches a <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, dealing <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, each dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Dahlia's ATK to one random enemy. After each instance of DMG dealt to a <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy target, the Toughness Reduction from this DMG is converted into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> at <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.\nThis effect can only trigger once per turn. If the target is defeated before the <u>Follow-Up ATK</u> is used, it will be launched at one random enemy instead.
132104.SimpleDesc: When entering combat, The Dahlia regenerates Energy and grants "Dance Partner" to this unit and the teammate who triggered combat. When a "Dance Partner" attacks a Weakness Broken enemy target, additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><u>Super Break DMG</u></color> to the target.\nAfter an enemy target is attacked by the other "Dance Partner," The Dahlia triggers a <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up ATK</u></color>, dealing minor Fire DMG to one random enemy target, and further deals 1 additional instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> to <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy targets, bouncing <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> times.
