132107.Name: The Heart Makes the Finest Tomb
132107.Desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies within this dimension will not actively attack ally targets. After entering combat with enemies in the Special Dimension, The Dahlia immediately deploys her Skill's Zone, and converts the combat-triggering Toughness Reduction into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u> at <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> against enemy targets that are <u>Weakness Broken</u>.\nOnly 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.

After entering combat with enemies in the dimension, The Dahlia immediately deploys a Zone and deals 1 additional instance of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Super Break DMG</u></color> to <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy targets.

When using Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATK</u>, recovers 1 Skill Point for allies. This effect can be triggered once for every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Talent's <u>Follow-Up ATKs</u> used.

If an ally Fire character implants a Weakness when using an attack, deals <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> fixed amount of Fire Toughness Reduction after the attack for every Weakness implanted. Also, regenerates Energy equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Max Energy. The maximum amount of Energy regenerated through this effect is capped at <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Max Energy.

1401.Name: The Herta
1401.Desc: Esteemed Genius Society #83, human, female, young, beautiful, attractive.\nIt's said that she lives in the far edge of the Cosmos, almost never leaving. Sounds like her appearance this time...\n...must be for some issue that requires a personal touch, right?

1.Name: Night at Shorefall
1.Desc: When the Enhanced Skill calculates the number of "Interpretation" stacks, additionally counts <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the number of "Interpretation" stacks on the 1 target with the most stacks among the primary target and adjacent targets. When "Interpretation" is reset by using the Enhanced Skill, its stack number is reset to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instead.

2.Name: Wind Through Keyhole
2.Desc: After The Herta enters battle or uses Ultimate, additionally gains 1 "Inspiration" stack. After using Enhanced Skill, <u>advances</u> The Herta's next action by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

3.Name: Door into Summer
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: The Sixteenth Key
4.Desc: The SPD of Erudition characters in the team increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Bitter Pill of Truth
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Desc: The Herta's Ice RES PEN increases by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. When the number of enemy targets on the field is 3 (or more)/2/1, Ultimate's DMG multiplier increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> respectively.

Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Herta's ATK to the targets hit by this instance of Skill and their respective adjacent targets. This effect can repeat 2 times.
140102.SimpleDesc: Deals DMG to one designated enemy. Deals DMG to the targets hit by this instance of Skill and their respective adjacent targets, repeating 2 times.

140103.Name: <unbreak>Told Ya!</unbreak> <unbreak>Magic Happens</unbreak>
140103.Desc: Rearranges the numbers of "Interpretation" stacks on all enemies, prioritizing the transfer of the higher numbers of "Interpretation" stacks to Elite-level targets and above. Then, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Herta's ATK to all enemies. When using Ultimate, increases The Herta's ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s). After the use, The Herta immediately takes action and gains 1 stack of "Inspiration." "Inspiration" can stack up to <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> time(s). While having "Inspiration," enhances Skill to "Hear Me Out."
140103.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Rearranges the numbers of "Interpretation" stacks</color> on all enemies, prioritizing the transfer of the higher numbers of "Interpretation" stacks to Elite-level targets and above. Then, deals Ice DMG to all enemies. After use, enhances Skill and immediately takes action.

140104.Name: Hand Them Over
140104.Desc: When enemy targets enter battle, The Herta inflicts 1 stack of "Interpretation" on them. At the start of each wave, applies <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Interpretation" to a random enemy target, prioritizing Elite-level targets and above. When the Enhanced Skill's primary target has "Interpretation," the multiplier for the DMG dealt increases, with each stack granting an increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> on the primary target/other targets respectively. If 2 or more characters follow the Path of Erudition in the team, each stack grants an additional increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> on the primary target/other targets respectively. "Interpretation" can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s). When using the Enhanced Skill, resets the number of "Interpretation" stacks on the primary target to 1. After the enemy target leaves the field or gets defeated by any unit, "Interpretation" will be transferred, prioritizing the transfer to Elite-level targets and above.

140106.Name: Attack
140106.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

140107.SimpleDesc: After using Technique, <color=#f29e38ff>can mark several Basic Treasures' locations</color>, and increases The Herta's ATK at the start of the next battle.\nAfter entering battle by using Technique in Simulated Universe or Divergent Universe, deals massive <u>True DMG</u> to all enemies at the start of each wave.

10000017.Name: True DMG
10000017.Desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as using 1 attack.

140109.Desc: Consumes 1 stack of "Inspiration." Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Herta's ATK to one designated enemy and inflicts <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Interpretation." Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Herta's ATK to the targets hit by this instance of Skill and their respective adjacent targets, repeating 2 times. At the end, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of The Herta's ATK to all enemies.
140109.SimpleDesc: Deals DMG to one designated enemy. Deals DMG to the targets hit by this instance of Skill and their respective adjacent targets, repeating 2 times. After that, deals DMG to all enemies.

1.PointDesc: When ally targets attack, inflicts 1 stack of "Interpretation" on the hit enemy target. After attacking, for every 1 target hit by this attack, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> fixed Energy for The Herta, counting up to a maximum of 5 targets. When using Enhanced Skill, if the primary target's "Interpretation" stack reaches <unbreak>42</unbreak>, increases the Ice DMG dealt by The Herta by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting until the end of this attack.

When entering battle, if the team has 2 or more Erudition characters, increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. And the Trace "Aloofly Honest" counts at least <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> target(s) when calculating the number of targets hit. After attacking, applies <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Interpretation" stack(s) to the target that has the highest existing "Interpretation" stacks among the hit enemy targets. If the attacker is an Erudition character, then additionally applies <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> "Interpretation" stack(s).

For every 1 stack of "Interpretation" inflicted on enemy targets, The Herta gains 1 stack of "Answer," up to a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s). When using Ultimate, each "Answer" stack increases this instance of Ultimate's DMG multiplier by <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak>.

1402.Name: Aglaea
1402.Desc: In that holy city kissed by the dawn, the weaver caresses the golden threads, entwining fates.\nThe Chrysos Heir that bears the "Romance" Coreflame gathered the world's heroes, leading them on a long journey once more\n— to topple the gods, reclaim the divine flame, and grant rebirth to the nearly fallen Amphoreus.

This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and lasts until any unit, other than Aglaea or Garmentmaker, actively uses an ability.

3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

Aglaea enters the "Supreme Stance" state and immediately takes action.\nWhile in "Supreme Stance," Aglaea gains the SPD Boost stacks from Garmentmaker's Memosprite Talent, with each stack increasing this unit's SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>. Enhances Basic ATK to "Slash by a Thousandfold Kiss," and cannot use Skill. Garmentmaker is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>.\nA countdown appears in the Action Order, with its own SPD set at <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>. While the countdown exists, using Ultimate again will reset the countdown. When the countdown's turn starts, Garmentmaker self-destructs. When Garmentmaker disappears, Aglaea dispels the "Supreme Stance" state.

1403.Name: Tribbie
1403.Desc: From that holy land blessed by the tripartite prophecy, the messenger split into a thousand forms, embarking on a long journey.\nTribios, Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, the Chrysos Heir who stole Passage's Coreflame, toiled for the masses and brought the news of deliverance to all domains.\n—Seek the children of humanity with golden blood in their veins, shatter the dimmest dark in this world, and walk toward the tomorrow where the stars gleam.

140303.Name: Guess Who Lives Here
140303.Desc: Activates a Zone and deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Tribbie's Max HP to all enemies.\nWhile the Zone lasts, increases enemy targets' DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>. 1404.Name: Mydei
1404.Desc: Kremnos, the mist-shrouded city of chaos and war! Its royal lineage is tainted with patricide, and its god bears the name of calamity.\nThe undying Mydeimos, the lion apart from the rest. Chrysos Heir who seeks the Coreflame of Strife, must suffer a thousand deaths, be bathed in blood on the path home, and bear the madness of fate alone.\n— Kingslayer be king, godslayer be god. Iron-hooves pound across the wilderness for the campaign, and must eventually soak in the blood of their homeland.

1.Name: Frost Hones Spine of Steel
1.Desc: Increases the DMG multiplier dealt by "Godslayer Be God" to the primary target by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This ability now deals to all enemies Imaginary DMG equal to the DMG multiplier dealt to the primary target.

Resets this tally of Charge after any unit takes action.

The next use of "Godslayer Be God" prioritizes attacking one designated enemy, and this effect only works on the latest target.

At the start of this unit's turn, automatically uses "Kingslayer Be King."\nWhen Charge reaches <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points during the "Vendetta" state, Mydei immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Godslayer Be God."\nWhen receiving a killing blow during the "Vendetta" state, Mydei will not be <u>knocked down</u>, but will clear his Charge, exits the "Vendetta" state, and restores HP by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP.

At the start of this unit's turn, <color=#f29e38ff>automatically uses</color> "Kingslayer Be King."\nWhen Charge reaches <unbreak>150</unbreak> during "Vendetta," Mydei immediately gains 1 <color=#f29e38ff><u>extra turn</u></color> and <color=#f29e38ff>automatically uses</color> "Godslayer Be God."\nWhen Mydei receives a killing blow, he exits the "Vendetta" state.

This unit accumulates <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Talent's Charge.

Up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> excess HP can be taken into account for this effect.

1405.Name: Anaxa
1405.Desc: The Grove of Epiphany, where knowledge flourishes and philosophers are born.\nYet here stands Anaxagoras the blasphemer, the Chrysos Heir who challenges the Coreflame of Reason. He is questioned: Would you defy the prophecy even if you must bear infamy, and insist on driving the thorns of doubt into the Sacred Tree of wisdom?\n——"Ridiculous. In a world full of lies, I am the only truth."

4.Desc: When using Skill, increases ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s).

Overflow DMG will not be tallied. After using Ultimate, clears this tally.

Consumables can be gained this way for up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s) in each Earth day.\nWhen entering battle with "Zagreus's Blessing" active, deals Quantum DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Cipher's ATK to all enemies. And the tallied amount Cipher gains from this instance of DMG increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

1407.Name: Castorice
1407.Desc: Aidonia, the snowy land that respects and worships death, has already sunken into sweet slumber.\nO Castorice, daughter of the River of Souls, the Chrysos Heir in search of the Coreflame of "Death," set forth! Guard the lament of the souls in this world, and embrace the solitude of destiny.\n— Life and death is a journey. When a butterfly rests on that dead branch, the withered will be reborn again.

"Ardent Will" can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and can be used to offset the HP cost of Netherwing's Memosprite Skill, "Breath Scorches the Shadow" and <u>advance Castorice's action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. When using the next Enhanced Skill, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud."

When breaking Weaknesses, triggers the Quantum Weakness Break effect. And the number of Bounces for Netherwing's Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins" additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

140702.Name: Silence, Wraithfly's Caress
140702.Desc: Consumes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of all allies' current HP. Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one designated enemy and Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to adjacent targets.\nIf the current HP is insufficient, reduces the current HP down to 1.\nIf Netherwing is on the battlefield, the Skill becomes "Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace" instead.
140702.SimpleDesc: Consumes all allies' HP. Deals Quantum DMG to one enemy and minor Quantum DMG to adjacent targets.

140703.Name: Doomshriek, Dawn's Chime
140703.Desc: <u>Summons the memosprite</u> Netherwing and <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. At the same time, deploys the <u>Territory</u> "Lost Netherland," which decreases all enemies' All-Type RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>. If Castorice has the DMG Boost effect from her Talent, then this effect spreads to Netherwing. Netherwing has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and a set Max HP equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud."\nAfter Netherwing experiences <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns or when its HP is 0, it disappears and dispels the <u>Territory</u> "Lost Netherland."
140703.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons the memosprite</u></color> Netherwing and <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. At the same time, deploys a <u>Territory</u> that <color=#f29e38ff>decreases All-Type RES</color> for all enemies.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

10000020.Name: Territory
10000020.Desc: Territory effects are unique in the battle. While it exists, other abilities with Territory effects cannot be used.

140704.Name: Desolation Across Palms
140704.Desc: The maximum limit of "Newbud" is related to the levels of all characters on the battlefield. For every 1 point of HP lost by all allies, Castorice gains 1 point of "Newbud." When "Newbud" reaches its maximum limit, can activate the Ultimate. When allies lose HP, Castorice's and Netherwing's DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s), lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhen Netherwing is on the field, "Newbud" cannot be gained through Talent, and every 1 point of HP lost by all allies (except Netherwing) will be converted to an equal amount of HP for Netherwing.
140704.SimpleDesc: When allies lose HP, Castorice gains <color=#f29e38ff>"Newbud"</color>. Increases Castorice's and Netherwing's <color=#f29e38ff>DMG dealt</color>. When <color=#f29e38ff>"Newbud"</color> reaches its maximum limit, can activate the Ultimate. While Netherwing is on the field, HP lost by allies (except Netherwing) will be converted to an equal amount of HP for Netherwing.

140706.Name: Attack
140706.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

140707.Name: Wail, Death's Herald
140707.Desc: After using Technique, enters the "Netherveil" state that lasts for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> seconds. While "Netherveil" is active, enemies are unable to actively approach Castorice.\nDuring "Netherveil," active attacks will cause all enemies within range to enter combat. At the same time, <u>summons the memosprite</u> Netherwing, <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, and deploys the <u>Territory</u> "Lost Netherland." Netherwing has its current HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud." After entering battle, consumes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current HP of all allies (except Netherwing).\nIf Netherwing is not summoned after entering battle, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of max "Newbud."
140707.SimpleDesc: Enters the "Netherveil" state. Enemies are unable to actively approach Castorice.\nDuring "Netherveil," attacks will cause all enemies within range to enter combat. At the same time, <color=#f29e38ff><u>summons the memosprite</u></color> Netherwing, <u>advances its action</u> by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. Upon entering battle, consumes HP of all allies (except Netherwing).\nIf Netherwing is not summoned after entering battle, Castorice gains "Newbud" by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of max "Newbud."

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

10000020.Name: Territory
10000020.Desc: Territory effects are unique in the battle. While it exists, other abilities with Territory effects cannot be used.

140709.Name: Boneclaw, Doomdrake's Embrace
140709.Desc: Consumes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the current HP of all allies (except Netherwing). Castorice and Netherwing launch <u>Joint ATK</u> on the targets, dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.\nIf the current HP is insufficient, reduces the current HP down to 1.
140709.SimpleDesc: Consumes all allies' HP. Castorice and Netherwing launch <u>Joint ATK</u> on the targets, dealing Quantum DMG to all enemies.

10000019.Name: Joint Attack
10000019.Desc: Multiple targets respectively use attacks on enemy targets in one action.

1.PointDesc: After ally targets (excluding Netherwing) receive healing, converts <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the healed amount into "Newbud." If Netherwing is on the field, this is converted to Netherwing's HP instead. Each ally target can accumulate a conversion amount up to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the max "Newbud." After any unit takes action, all units reset their accumulated conversion amount.

When Castorice's current HP is higher than or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of her Max HP, her SPD increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When Netherwing uses "Breath Scorches the Shadow" and deals fatal damage to all enemies on the field or brings them to a point where their HP cannot be reduced further, Netherwing's SPD increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for 1 turn.

Each time Netherwing uses "Breath Scorches the Shadow," the DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) and lasts until the end of this turn.

1140701.Name: Claw Splits the Veil
1140701.Desc: Deals Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.
1140701.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all enemies.

1140702.Name: Breath Scorches the Shadow
1140702.Desc: Launching "Breath Scorches the Shadow" will consume <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Netherwing's Max HP to deal Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to all enemies.\nIn one attack, "Breath Scorches the Shadow" can be launched repeatedly, with the DMG multiplier increased progressively to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> / <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>. After reaching <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, it will not increase further. The DMG Multiplier Boost effect will not decrease before Netherwing disappears.\nWhen Netherwing's current HP is equal to or less than <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of its Max HP, launching this ability will actively reduce HP down to 1, and then trigger the ability effect equal to that of the Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."
1140702.SimpleDesc: Consumes this unit's HP to deal Quantum DMG to all enemies, and this turn will not conclude. When using this ability repeatedly, the ability can be enhanced up to 3 times. When HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, using this ability will actively trigger the ability effect of Memosprite Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

1140703.Name: Mooncocoon Shrouds the Form
1140703.Desc: When Netherwing is on the field, it acts as <u>backup</u> for allies. When allies take DMG or consume HP, their current HP can be reduced down to a minimum of 1, after which Netherwing will bear the HP loss. But Netherwing consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the original value. This lasts until Netherwing disappears.
1140703.SimpleDesc: When Netherwing is on the field, it acts as <u>backup</u> for allies. Allies' current HP can be reduced down to a minimum of 1, after which Netherwing will bear the DMG received or the HP consumed.

10000021.Name: Backup
10000021.Desc: Enemies cannot actively target backup units. Allies' Blast-type abilities cannot Blast to backup units.

1140705.Name: Roar Rumbles the Realm
1140705.Desc: When Netherwing is summoned, increases DMG dealt by all allies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
1140705.SimpleDesc: When summoned, increases the DMG dealt by all allies.

1140706.Name: Wings Sweep the Ruins
1140706.Desc: When Netherwing disappears, deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one random enemy. At the same time, restores HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies.
1140706.SimpleDesc: Upon disappearing, deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy that Bounces a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). At the same time, restores HP for all allies.

1140710.Name: Breath Scorches the Shadow
1140710.SimpleDesc: Consumes this unit's HP to deal Quantum DMG to all enemies, and this turn will not conclude. When using this ability repeatedly, the ability can be enhanced up to 3 times. When HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, using this ability will actively trigger the ability effect of Memosprite Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

1140711.Name: Breath Scorches the Shadow
1140711.SimpleDesc: Consumes this unit's HP to deal Quantum DMG to all enemies, and this turn will not conclude. When using this ability repeatedly, the ability can be enhanced up to 3 times. When HP is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> or lower, using this ability will actively trigger the ability effect of Memosprite Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins."

1140712.Name: Wings Sweep the Ruins
1140712.Desc: Consumes all HP and deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Quantum DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP to one random enemy. At the same time, restores HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Castorice's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies.
1140712.SimpleDesc: Consumes all HP and deals minor Quantum DMG to one enemy that Bounces a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). At the same time, restores HP for all allies.

140704.Name: Sanctuary of Mooncocoon
140704.Desc: After obtaining Castorice or when Castorice is in the current team, receive the following effect: In battle, when an ally character receives a killing blow, all ally characters that received a killing blow in this action enter the "Mooncocoon" state. Characters in "Mooncocoon" temporarily delay becoming <u>downed</u> and can take actions normally. After the action and before the start of the next turn, if their current HP increases or they gain a Shield, "Mooncocoon" is removed. Otherwise, they will be <u>downed</u> immediately. This effect can only trigger once per battle.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

1408.Name: Phainon
1408.Desc: Aedes Elysiae, a remote frontier village isolated from the world, now lives on only in cryptic legends.\nThe Nameless hero, ████████, the Chrysos Heir holding the Coreflame of "Worldbearing," memorizes the ideals of the entire world, carries the fate of millions, and brings the first light of dawn to the new world\n—"But if dawn should never come, let this fury consume this body, and rise as tomorrow's blazing sun!"

1.Name: Fire and Light Bind Virtue and Vice
1.Desc: The base SPD inheritance ratio for <u>Khaslana's extra turn</u> increases to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>. For every enemy target defeated in one battle, additionally increases this ratio by <unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak>, up to a max of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.\nWhen using Ultimate, increases CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

10014082.Name: Khaslana's Extra Turn
10014082.Desc: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

2.Name: Sky and Earth Churn Mortal Froth
2.Desc: Khaslana's Physical <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. When one use of "Foundation: Stardeath Verdict" consumes <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>"Scourge"</u> point(s), gains 1 <u>extra turn</u>.

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

3.Name: Depths of Quiet, Entombed in Ruin
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Faces of Titans, Blurred by Time
4.Desc: When using "Calamity: Soulscorch Edict," additionally gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "Soulscorch."

5.Name: The Wheel Spins Forevermore
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Embers of Old Rise Still
6.Desc: The number of overflow points allowed for "Coreflame" no longer has an upper limit. When the battle starts, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Coreflame."\nAfter using the attack from "Foundation: Stardeath Verdict," additionally deals <u>True DMG</u> equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the total DMG dealt in this attack to the enemy target with the highest HP.

10000017.Name: True DMG
10000017.Desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as using 1 attack.

140801.Name: Stride to Deliverance
140801.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Phainon's ATK to one designated enemy.
140801.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

140802.Name: Let There Be Light
140802.Desc: Gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Coreflame," dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Phainon's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Phainon's ATK to adjacent targets.
140802.SimpleDesc: Gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of <color=#f29e38ff>"Coreflame"</color>, dealing massive Physical DMG to one enemy and Physical DMG to adjacent targets.

140803.Name: He Who Bears the World Must Burn
140803.Desc: Transforms into Khaslana. During the transformation, deploys the <u>Territory</u> "Ruinous Irontomb." Within the <u>Territory</u>, other teammates <u>depart</u> and cannot take action, and all enemies have Physical Weaknesses.\nKhaslana does not enter his own turn, but has <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> <u>Khaslana's extra turn(s)</u>, with a SPD set at <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Khaslana's base SPD. When the last of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u> starts, immediately launches a final hit and deals Physical Ultimate DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK that is distributed evenly across all enemies.
140803.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Transforms into Khaslana</color> and deploys a <u>Territory</u>: Teammates <u>depart</u> and cannot take action, and all enemies have Physical Weaknesses.\nKhaslana does not enter his own turn, but has <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> <u>Khaslana's <color=#f29e38ff>extra turn(s)</color></u>. In the final turn, launches a final hit and deals massive Physical DMG that is distributed evenly across all enemies.

10000016.Name: Departed
10000016.Desc: Targets in the Departed state cannot be designated as ability targets and will not appear in the Action Order.

10000020.Name: Territory
10000020.Desc: Territory effects are unique in the battle. While it exists, other abilities with Territory effects cannot be used.

10014082.Name: Khaslana's Extra Turn
10014082.Desc: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

140804.Name: Pyric Corpus
140804.Desc: Phainon's Talent. When "Coreflame" reaches <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s), can activate Ultimate. Even after reaching the limit, can still hold up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> overflow point(s). When the transformation ends, gains "Coreflame" based on the number of overflow points.\nWhen Phainon is targeted by an ability from any other target, gains 1 "Coreflame" point. And if the ability is cast by one of Phainon's teammates, can also increase Phainon's CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
140804.SimpleDesc: Phainon's Talent. When "Coreflame" reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>, can activate Ultimate.\nWhen Phainon is <color=#f29e38ff>targeted by abilities from other targets</color>, gains <color=#f29e38ff>"Coreflame"</color>. When targeted by a teammate's ability, increases CRIT DMG.

140805.Name: Fate: Divine Vessel
140805.Desc: Khaslana's Talent. Upon transformation, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of <u>"Scourge"</u>. If this happens during an ally target's turn, then the duration of all <u>buffs</u> on that target is extended by 1 turn and the current turn ends.\nKhaslana is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>, has 1 Enhanced Basic ATK and 2 Enhanced Skills, but cannot use Ultimate. During the transformation, increases ATK by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> and Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>. After using an attack, restores HP equal to <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. When Khaslana takes a killing blow, he will not get <u>knocked down</u>. Instead, he will restore HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Max HP and immediately launch a final hit. For every 1 remaining <u>Khaslana's extra turn</u>, the final hit's DMG multiplier decreases by <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak> of its original multiplier value.\nWhen the transformation ends, increases all allies' SPD by <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> for 1 turn.
140805.SimpleDesc: Khaslana's Talent. Upon transformation, gains <u>"Scourge"</u>.\nKhaslana is immune to <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> and has <color=#f29e38ff>3 new abilities</color>. During the transformation, increases ATK and Max HP. Using attacks restores HP. When taking a killing blow, restores HP and immediately uses a final hit. The more remaining actions he has, the lower the DMG multiplier.\nWhen the transformation ends, increases all allies' SPD.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000009.Name: Buff
10000009.Desc: Can buff combat ability for a period of time, which can be dispelled unless otherwise specified.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

10014082.Name: Khaslana's Extra Turn
10014082.Desc: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

140806.Name: Attack
140806.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

140807.Name: Beginning of the End
140807.Desc: While Phainon is in the team, increases Max Technique Points by 3.\nWhen actively using this Technique, consumes 2 Technique Points and immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, regenerates <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy for allies and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>"Scourge"</u> and <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s). Deals Physical DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Phainon's ATK to all enemies at the start of each wave.\nIf attacking a normal enemy, immediately defeats them without entering combat. No Technique Points are consumed if no enemies are hit.
140807.SimpleDesc: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Max Technique Points</color> by 3. When actively using this Technique, consumes 2 Technique Points to attack all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, regenerates Energy for allies and gains Skill Points and <u>"Scourge."</u> Deals Physical DMG to all enemies at the start of each wave.\nIf attacking a normal enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>immediately defeats them</color> without entering combat. No Technique Points are consumed if no enemies are hit.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

140808.Name: Creation: Bloodthorn Ferry
140808.Desc: Gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of <u>"Scourge"</u>, dealing Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK to adjacent targets.
140808.SimpleDesc: Gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of <color=#f29e38ff><u>"Scourge"</u></color>, dealing massive Physical DMG to one designated enemy and Physical DMG to adjacent targets.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

140809.Name: Calamity: Soulscorch Edict
140809.Desc: Gains <u>"Scourge"</u> by an amount equal to the number of enemies and 1 stack of "Soulscorch," then causes all enemies to immediately take action.\nWhile in the "Soulscorch" state, Khaslana takes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> reduced DMG. After an enemy target attacks or takes action, gains 1 more stack of "Soulscorch." After said enemy targets finish their actions, immediately launches <u>Counter</u>, deals Physical DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK, and additionally deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance being Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK dealt to one random enemy. Afterward, "Soulscorch" is dispelled. Each "Soulscorch" stack increases the DMG multiplier of said <u>Counter</u> by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of its original multiplier value.\nDMG dealt through this ability is considered as Skill DMG. If "Soulscorch" is still active at the start of <u>Khaslana's extra turn</u>, immediately launches <u>Counter</u>.
140809.SimpleDesc: Gains an equal amount of <color=#f29e38ff><u>"Scourge"</u></color> based on the number of enemies, and causes them to immediately take action. Gains "Soulscorch": Reduces DMG taken. After all enemy targets have taken action, launches <color=#f29e38ff><u>Counter</u></color>, and deals minor Physical DMG to all enemies that bounces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), with each time dealing minor Physical DMG to one random enemy. The more actions enemies take, the higher the DMG.

10000003.Name: Counter
10000003.Desc: An effect that automatically triggers when the target is attacked, which unleashes an extra attack on the attacker.\nCounter is also considered a Follow-Up ATK.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

10014082.Name: Khaslana's Extra Turn
10014082.Desc: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

140811.Name: Foundation: Stardeath Verdict
140811.Desc: Dispels all <u>debuffs</u> on this unit, then deals Physical DMG equal to a max of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK.\nFor every 1 point of <u>"Scourge"</u> consumed, deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance being Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK dealt to one random enemy. When consuming <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s) of <u>"Scourge"</u>, additionally deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK, which is evenly distributed across all enemies.
140811.SimpleDesc: Dispels all <u>debuffs</u> on this unit. <color=#f29e38ff>For every 1 <u>"Scourge"</u> consumed, bounces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s)</color>, with each time dealing minor Physical DMG to one random enemy.\nIf <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> <u>"Scourge"</u> are consumed, additionally deals massive Physical DMG that is evenly taken by all enemies.

10000010.Name: Debuff
10000010.Desc: Debuffs are negative status effects that render units weaker. Unless otherwise specified, debuffs can be dispelled.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

1.PointDesc: When the battle starts, gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Coreflame." When the transformation ends, gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Coreflame."

When receiving healing or a Shield from a teammate, deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> increased DMG for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This effect cannot trigger repeatedly within one turn.\nWhen receiving an Energy Regeneration effect from a teammate's ability, gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> point(s) of "Coreflame."
When entering combat or ending transformation, increases ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).

1409.Name: Hyacine
1409.Desc: As the city-state in the clouds crumbles through time, the Twilight Courtyard opens its gates once more, bringing a glimmer of light to Evernight.\nPhysician Hyacinthia is the Chrysos Heir who watches over the Coreflame of Sky. Carrying the will of her ancestors, she mends the torn fabric of dusk and dawn.\nMay the rainbow light pour down, dissolve all grudges, and bring the dawn back to this land.

1.Name: Cradle the Candle of Night
1.Desc: While Hyacine is in the "After Rain" state, all ally targets additionally increase their Max HP by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and after using an attack, immediately restore their HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Hyacine's Max HP.

2.Name: Come Sit in My Courtyard
2.Desc: When an ally target's HP decreases, SPD increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

3.Name: Depart, Unto the Sun!
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Sunlit Amber, Yours to Keep
4.Desc: The "Tempestuous Halt" Trace gets enhanced: For every <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> excess SPD, additionally increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Twilight Drapes the Tide
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: O Sky, Heed My Plea
6.Desc: When Little Ica uses Memosprite Skill, the amount cleared from the tally of healing is changed to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. While Little Ica is on the field, all ally targets' All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

140901.Name: When Breeze Kisses Cirrus
140901.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP to one designated enemy.
140901.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

140902.Name: Love Over the Rainbow
140902.Desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Little Ica. Restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies (except Little Ica), and restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> for Little Ica.
140902.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons memosprite</u></color> Little Ica, and restores HP for all allies.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

140903.Name: We Who Fly <unbreak>Into Twilight</unbreak>
140903.Desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Little Ica. Restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> for all allies (except Little Ica), and restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> for Little Ica. Hyacine enters the "After Rain" state, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Hyacine's every turn. While "After Rain" is active, all ally targets increase their Max HP by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color> plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>.
140903.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons memosprite</u></color> Little Ica, and restores HP for all allies. Enters the "After Rain" state. While Hyacine is in this state, <color=#f29e38ff>increases all allies' Max HP</color>.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

140904.Name: First Light Heals the World
140904.Desc: The memosprite Little Ica initially has Max HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Hyacine's Max HP. When Hyacine or Little Ica provides healing, increases Little Ica's DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Stacks up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s).
140904.SimpleDesc: When Hyacine or Little Ica provides healing, increases Little Ica's DMG dealt.

140906.Name: Attack
140906.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

140907.Name: Day So Right, Life So Fine!
140907.Desc: When the next battle starts, restores HP by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for all allies and increases Max HP by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
140907.SimpleDesc: When the next battle starts, restores HP for all allies and <color=#f29e38ff>increases Max HP</color>.

1.PointDesc: Increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When providing healing to an ally target whose current HP is equal to or less than <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of their Max HP, increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's Outgoing Healing by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
Increases Hyacine's Effect RES by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When using Skill and Ultimate, dispels <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <u>debuff(s)</u> from all ally targets.

10000010.Name: Debuff
10000010.Desc: Debuffs are negative status effects that render units weaker. Unless otherwise specified, debuffs can be dispelled.

1.PointDesc: When Hyacine's SPD exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, increases her and Little Ica's Max HP by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. Then, for every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> excess SPD, increases Hyacine's and Little Ica's Outgoing Healing by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. Up to a max of <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> excess SPD can be taken into account for this effect.

1140901.Name: Rainclouds, Time to Go!
1140901.Desc: Deals Wind DMG to all enemies by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the tally of healing done by Hyacine and Little Ica in the current battle, and clears <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of this tally of healing.
1140901.SimpleDesc: Deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

1140903.Name: Take Sky in Hand
1140903.Desc: Little Ica maintains 0 SPD, is immune to <u>debuffs</u>, and will not appear in the Action Order.\nIf the HP of an ally target (except Little Ica) is reduced, then at the start of any target's turn or after any target takes action, Little Ica will consume <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their own Max HP and heal the ally target with reduced HP for an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>.\nWhile Hyacine is in the "After Rain" state, Little Ica gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically casts "Rainclouds, Time to Go!" immediately after Hyacine uses an ability. Moreover, when Little Ica triggers the Talent's healing effect, additionally restores HP for all ally targets by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hyacine's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>. After Little Ica uses an ability, the duration of all their <u>Continuous Effects</u> decreases by 1 turn.
1140903.SimpleDesc: If an ally target (except Little Ica) has <color=#f29e38ff>reduced HP</color>, Little Ica will consume their own HP and <color=#f29e38ff>restore HP</color> for the target. When Hyacine has "After Rain," Little Ica gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses Memosprite Skill immediately after Hyacine uses an ability. After Little Ica uses an ability, the duration of their <u>Continuous Effects</u> decreases by 1 turn.

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000010.Name: Debuff
10000010.Desc: Debuffs are negative status effects that render units weaker. Unless otherwise specified, debuffs can be dispelled.

10000022.Name: Continuous Effect
10000022.Desc: Includes buffs, debuffs, and other effects.

1140905.Name: Soar, Unto the Sunlight
1140905.Desc: When summoned, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for Hyacine. On the first summon, additionally regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy.
1140905.SimpleDesc: When summoned, regenerates Energy for Hyacine.

1140906.Name: Fall, Then Take Wing
1140906.Desc: Upon disappearing, <u>advances the action</u> of Hyacine by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
1140906.SimpleDesc: Upon disappearing, <u>advances the action</u> of Hyacine.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1410.Name: Hysilens
1410.Desc: Styxia, the coastal city of intoxication and dreams, where echoes of old songs still drift among the waves.\nHelektra, Daughter of the Sea, Chrysos Heir who cleanses the Ocean's Coreflame, dispels the murky undercurrents and orchestrates a banquet of revelry for the heroes beyond the sky.\nThe show must go on. Even if hope is as fragile as bubbles, the waves will keep surging forward.

1.Name: You Ask Why Hearts Cry
1.Desc: While Hysilens is on the field, the DoT dealt by ally targets is equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their original value. When Hysilens inflicts Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock on enemies via her Talent, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to additionally inflict the target with 1 instance of Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock state that is equivalent to those from the original Talent effect and can coexist with such pre-existing states.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

2.Name: Tell Me Why Waves Roar High
2.Desc: While the Zone is active, the DMG Boost effect from Trace "The Fiddle of Pearls" applies to all allies.

3.Name: Why Do Lights Bid Goodbye
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Lo, How Time Flows By
4.Desc: While the Zone is active, reduces All-Type RES of all enemies by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: In Ablution, I Hum and Sigh
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: When to Return From Where You Lie
6.Desc: While the Zone is active, at the start of each turn or after one attack by an ally target, increases the maximum trigger count for Hysilens's Physical DoT effect to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, and increases the multiplier of the DMG dealt by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

141001.Name: Aeolian Mode: Echoes in Still Waters
141001.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hysilens's ATK to one designated enemy.
141001.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

141002.Name: Overtone Hum: Chorus After Dark Tides
141002.Desc: Has a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase the DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> turn(s). At the same time, deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hysilens's ATK to all enemies.
141002.SimpleDesc: There is a high chance to increase the DMG taken by all enemies, and deals Physical DMG to them.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

141003.Name: Maelstrom Rhapsody
141003.Desc: Hysilens deploys a Zone that reduces enemy targets' ATK by <unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak> and DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Hysilens's ATK to all enemies.\nFor every 1 instance of DoT taken by an enemy target within the Zone, Hysilens deals Physical DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK to them. This damage triggers at the start of each turn or after one attack by an ally target, up to <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> time(s). And it cannot repeatedly trigger this effect.\nThe Zone lasts for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s) and this duration decreases by 1 at the start of this unit's every turn. When Hysilens gets <u>knocked down</u>, the Zone will also be dispelled.
141003.SimpleDesc: Deploys a Zone that <color=#f29e38ff>reduces all enemies' ATK and DEF</color>, and deals Physical DMG to them. While the Zone exists, for every 1 instance of DoT received by enemy targets, <color=#f29e38ff>deals 1 instance of Physical DoT</color> to them.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

141004.Name: Sirenic Serenade
141004.Desc: When an ally target attacks, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> for Hysilens to inflict the hit enemy target with one of the following states: Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock. Priority is given to inflicting a different state.\nWhile in the Wind Shear/Burn/Shock state, at the start of each turn, the enemy target takes Wind/Fire/Lightning DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hysilens's ATK for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile in the Bleed state, at the start of each turn, the enemy target takes Physical DoT equal to <unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak> of their Max HP, up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Hysilens's ATK, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
141004.SimpleDesc: When an ally target attacks, Hysilens has a high chance to inflict the hit enemy target with one of the following states: <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock</color>.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

141006.Name: Attack
141006.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

141007.Name: At Ocean's Abode
141007.Desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds and automatically moves forward. Enemies within the Special Dimension enter the "Soulstruck" state. "Soulstruck" enemies will not attack ally targets and will follow the dimension while it persists.\nAfter entering combat with "Soulstruck" enemies, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict each enemy target with <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> of the following states: Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock, all of which are equivalent to those provided by Hysilens's Talent effect. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
141007.SimpleDesc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies within the dimension will not attack ally targets. After entering combat with enemies within the dimension, there's a high chance to inflict <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> state(s) from <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear/Bleed/Burn/Shock</color> on each enemy target.

30000001.Name: Base Chance
30000001.Desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.PointDesc: At the start of combat, Hysilens deploys a Zone, equivalent to that provided by her Ultimate, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Whenever Hysilens deploys a Zone, she recovers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s).

When Hysilens uses Ultimate, if the enemy target is currently afflicted with DoT(s), all DoTs currently applied on the target will immediately produce DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their original DMG.

For every <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Hysilens's Effect Hit Rate that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, increases her DMG dealt by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

1412.Name: Cerydra
1412.Desc: The Northern Empire, a lost dynasty, where its frozen lands burn with the fever of conquest.\nSovereign Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir who wields the Coreflame of "Law," weaves her schemes, contends with the gods, passes judgment upon the faithless, and lays the foundation of Flame-Chase into this world.\n..."This is far from the end. Amphoreus's journey is set to blaze across the stars!"

1.Name: Seize the Crowns of All
1.Desc: The character with "Military Merit" ignores <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the targets' DEF when dealing DMG. If "Military Merit" has been upgraded to "Peerage," then the character additionally ignores <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the targets' DEF when dealing Skill DMG. When Cerydra uses her Skill, regenerates <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy for the designated ally target.

2.Name: Forge the Dreams of Many
2.Desc: The character with "Military Merit" deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> increased DMG. While a teammate on the field has "Military Merit," Cerydra's DMG dealt increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

3.Name: Torch the Laws of Old
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Remake the Realms of Men
4.Desc: Increases Ultimate's DMG multiplier by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Help and Hurt Repaid in Full
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: A Journey Set Starward
6.Desc: The character with "Military Merit" increases their All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, and the multiplier for the <u>Additional DMG</u> triggered via "Military Merit" increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>. While a teammate on the field has "Military Merit," Cerydra's All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

141201.Name: King's Castling
141201.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cerydra's ATK to one designated enemy.
141201.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

141202.Name: Pawn's Promotion
141202.Desc: Grants "Military Merit" to one designated ally character and gives Cerydra <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points of Charge. Charge is capped at <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points. When Charge reaches <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> points, automatically upgrades the character's "Military Merit" to "Peerage" and dispels their <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. The character with "Peerage" is considered to have "Military Merit" simultaneously. The character with "Peerage" increases the CRIT DMG for their dealt Skill DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, increases their All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f1]%</unbreak></color>, and triggers <u>Coup de Main</u> when using their Skill on enemy targets. After <u>Coup de Main</u> ends, consumes <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> points of Charge to revert "Peerage" to "Military Merit."
141202.SimpleDesc: Grants "Military Merit" to an ally character and gives Charge to Cerydra. When Charge reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> points, automatically upgrades the ally character's "Military Merit" to "Peerage." The character with "Peerage" <color=#f29e38ff>increases the CRIT DMG for their dealt Skill DMG, increases All-Type <u>RES PEN</u></color>, and can trigger <color=#f29e38ff><u>Coup de Main</u></color>.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

10000023.Name: Coup de Main
10000023.Desc: Copy and immediately use the ability about to be used, then use the original ability.\nCoup de Main won't trigger Coup de Main again.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

141203.Name: Scholar's Mate
141203.Desc: Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge. Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cerydra's ATK to all enemies. If no character on the field has "Military Merit," prioritizes granting "Military Merit" to the first character in the current team.
141203.SimpleDesc: Gains Charge. Deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

141204.Name: Ave Imperator
141204.Desc: The character with "Military Merit" increases ATK by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Cerydra's ATK. When the character uses Basic ATK or Skill, Cerydra gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Charge. During <u>Coup de Main</u>, Cerydra cannot gain Charge. After the character with "Military Merit" uses an attack, Cerydra additionally deals 1 instance of Wind <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of her ATK. This effect can trigger up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s). The trigger count resets every time Cerydra uses her Ultimate. "Military Merit" only takes effect on the most recent target. When the target changes, Cerydra's Charge is reset to 0.
141204.SimpleDesc: The character with "Military Merit" <color=#f29e38ff>increases their ATK</color>. When they use Basic ATK or Skill, Cerydra gains Charge. After the character with "Military Merit" uses an attack, Cerydra additionally deals minor Wind <u>Additional DMG</u>.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10000023.Desc: Copy and immediately use the ability about to be used, then use the original ability.\nCoup de Main won't trigger Coup de Main again.

141207.Desc: After using Technique, gains "Military Merit." When switching the active character, "Military Merit" transfers to the current active character. At the start of the next battle, automatically uses Skill 1 time on the character with "Military Merit" without consuming any Skill Points.

1.PointDesc: For every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> of Cerydra's ATK that exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, increases her CRIT DMG by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

Increases Cerydra's CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. While Cerydra's Charge is below its maximum, the character with "Military Merit" using their Ultimate grants Cerydra <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge. This effect can trigger once per battle.

When using Skill, increases SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> for this unit and the teammate with "Military Merit," lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s). When the character with "Military Merit" uses Basic ATK or Skill, regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy for Cerydra.

1413.Name: Evernight
1413.Desc: In the Memory Zone secluded from the world, candlelight reflects the past, silently extinguishing in the mist.\nEvernight, child of Remembrance emerging from those shadows, the Chrysos Heir who conceals the Coreflame of "Time," raises the waves of "Oblivion" to protect the wishes of those in the mirror\n"Don't worry, I will guard the path of Trailblaze for you... at any cost. ♭"

1.Name: Sleep Tight, the Night Dreams Long
1.Desc: When Evernight is on the field, if there are (4 or more)/3/2/1 enemy targets on the field, ally memosprites deal DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> of their original DMG respectively.

2.Name: Listen Up, the Slumber Speaks Soft

Each time Evernight gains "Memoria," increases the amount of "Memoria" gain by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s). When using Ultimate, additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge for "Darkest Riddle."

After use, consumes all "Memoria" and HP, and makes Evey disappear.

1414.Name: Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae
1414.Desc: The chest of Georios, the body of the fallen dragon supporting the shattered earth, enduring millennia of pain.\nDan Heng, the Nameless and the Chrysos Heir who guards the Earth's Coreflame, steadies the world before it falls and guides all life across the land to a new home beyond.\nRivers flow to the sea, mountains echo in harmony, and the eternal path stretches ten thousand miles.

1415.Name: Cyrene
1415.Desc: A meteor streaks across the night sky, stirring ripples in the river of life, shimmering with thirteen hues.\nDaughter of Aedes Elysiae, nurturer of the Chrysos Heir of "███," plants the Seed of Memory, letting yesterday's flowers bloom in tomorrow\n—"Now, let's write a different kind of poem together♪"

1.Name: Epics, Born on a Blank Slate
1.Desc: When ███ triggers the Memosprite Skill "Ode to ██" while using "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes," gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) and increases the number of bounces for this attack by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.
