5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Remembrance, Sung in Ripples ♪
6.Desc: When Cyrene uses her Ultimate for the first time, all allies' <u>actions advance</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Each time when ███ triggers the Memosprite Skill "Ode to ██" and uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes," based on the number of times it has been triggered, gains the following effects:\n1 time: When ███ is on the field, reduces all enemy targets' DEF by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.\n2 times and more: <u>Advances all allies' actions</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

141501.Name: Lo, Hope Takes Flight!
141501.Desc: Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cyrene's Max HP to one designated enemy.
141501.SimpleDesc: Gains "Recollection" and deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

141502.Name: Bloom, Elysium of Beyond
141502.Desc: Gains <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) and deploys a Zone that lasts for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turns. The Zone's duration decreases by 1 at the start of Cyrene's every turn. While the Zone lasts, for each instance of DMG dealt by all ally targets, deals 1 additional instance of <u>True DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG. When Cyrene is <u>downed</u>, the Zone will also be dispelled.
141502.SimpleDesc: Gains "Recollection" and deploys a Zone. Additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><u>True DMG</u></color> after all ally targets deal DMG.

10000007.Name: Downed State
10000007.Desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

10000017.Name: True DMG
10000017.Desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as using 1 attack.

141503.Name: Verse ◦ Vow ∞
141503.Desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> ███, causes it to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>, and activates all teammates' Ultimate. Then, enters the "Ripples of Past Reverie" state, with Basic ATK enhanced to "To Love and Tomorrow ♪" and can only use this Basic ATK. Increases Cyrene's and ███'s CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, and deploys the Zone effect from the Skill with no active duration.\nCan only be used once per combat. ███'s initial Max HP equals to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Cyrene's Max HP.
141503.SimpleDesc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> ███, causes it to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u>, and <color=#f29e38ff>activates all teammates' Ultimates</color>. Then, she enters the "Ripples of Past Reverie" state and gains Enhanced Basic ATK. Increases Cyrene's and ███'s CRIT Rate, deploys the Zone effect from Skill, and the Zone effect no longer has a duration limit.

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

141504.Name: Hearts Gather as One
141504.Desc: When combat begins or after Cyrene takes action, other ally characters under any state and their memosprites gain "Future." When ally targets with "Future" take action, consumes "Future" to grant Cyrene <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s). When Cyrene has <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" points, can activate Ultimate and dispel all <u>debuffs</u> on her. When she has <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" points during the "Ripples of Past Reverie" state, can activate Ultimate. After reaching the maximum, it can overflow by up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points. While Cyrene is on the field, increases DMG dealt by all ally targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>.
141504.SimpleDesc: When combat begins or after Cyrene takes action, teammates and their memosprites gain "Future." When ally targets with "Future" take action, Cyrene gains "Recollection." While Cyrene is on the field, increases DMG dealt by ally targets.

10000010.Name: Debuff
10000010.Desc: Debuffs are negative status effects that render units weaker. Unless otherwise specified, debuffs can be dispelled.

141506.Name: Attack
141506.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

141507.Name: Peace at West Wind's End
141507.Desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s) around the character. Enemies within this Special Dimension enter the "This Moment, Forever" state. While in this state, enemies will cease all actions. Ally characters within this Special Dimension have <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> increased movement speed. After entering combat within the duration, deploys the Skill's Zone. Only 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
141507.SimpleDesc: Creates a Special Dimension around the character. Enemies within this dimension enter the "This Moment, Forever" state while ally characters within this dimension have increased movement speed. After entering combat, deploys the Skill's Zone.

141508.Name: To Love and Tomorrow ♪
141508.Desc: Gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" points and deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cyrene's Max HP to one designated enemy. Then, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Cyrene's Max HP to all enemies.\n"To Love and Tomorrow ♪" cannot recover Skill Points.
141508.SimpleDesc: Gains "Recollection" and deals Ice DMG to all enemies.

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

141519.Name: Attack
141519.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

1.PointDesc: When a teammate's memosprite is summoned, it gains "Future." "Future" held by the memosprite won't be consumed.

When there are 1/2/3 <u>Chrysos Heir</u> or Remembrance characters (excluding Cyrene) in the team, Cyrene gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> "Recollection" point(s) respectively at the start of combat.

10000025.Name: Chrysos Heir
10000025.Desc: Cyrene, Tribbie, Cerydra, Evernight, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Hysilens, Hyacine, Phainon, Anaxa, Aglaea, Mydei, Castorice, Cipher, Trailblazer (Remembrance).

1.PointDesc: When Cyrene's SPD is at <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or higher, increases all allies' DMG dealt by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>. Then, for each point of SPD exceeded, increases Cyrene and ███'s Ice <u>RES PEN</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, counting up to a maximum of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> exceeded SPD points.

30000005.Name: RES PEN
30000005.Desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

1141501.Name: Minuet of Blooms and Plumes
1141501.Desc: Deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of ███'s Max HP.
1141501.SimpleDesc: Deals Ice DMG to all enemies.

1141502.Name: This Ode, to All Lives
1141502.Desc: Applies a <u>buff</u> to one designated ally character. When the character is a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, the target gains a <color=#f9b0f0><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarCyrene id=0 width=1 height=1>special</unbreak> effect</u></color>. When the character is not a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, increases the target's DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turns. This effect also applies on memosprites.
1141502.SimpleDesc: Applies a <u>buff</u> to one ally character. When the character is a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, the target gains a <color=#f9b0f0><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarCyrene id=0 width=1 height=1>special</unbreak> effect</u></color>. When the character is not a <u>Chrysos Heir</u>, increases the target's DMG dealt. This effect also applies on memosprites.

10000009.Name: Buff
10000009.Desc: Can buff combat ability for a period of time, which can be dispelled unless otherwise specified.

10000025.Name: Chrysos Heir
10000025.Desc: Cyrene, Tribbie, Cerydra, Evernight, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Hysilens, Hyacine, Phainon, Anaxa, Aglaea, Mydei, Castorice, Cipher, Trailblazer (Remembrance).

1141503.Name: Waiting, In Every Past
1141503.Desc: ███'s SPD remains at 0, and ███ will not appear on the Action Order. While on the field, it is considered as <u>Out-of-Bounds</u> When changes occur on Cyrene's HP percentage, ███'s HP percentage will also change accordingly. When ███ is on the field, Cyrene's and ███'s Max HP increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After using abilities, all <u>Continuous Effects'</u> duration on this unit decreases by 1.
1141503.SimpleDesc: When changes occur on Cyrene's HP, ███'s HP will also change accordingly. While ███ is on the field, Cyrene's Max HP increases.

10000022.Name: Continuous Effect
10000022.Desc: Includes buffs, debuffs, and other effects.

10000024.Name: Out-of-Bounds
10000024.Desc: Neither allies nor enemies can actively select Out-of-Bounds units.

1141505.Name: "Hello, World ♪"
1141505.Desc: When ███ is summoned, dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> from all allies.
1141505.SimpleDesc: When summoned, dispels <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> from all allies.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

1141513.Name: Ode to Genesis
1141513.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Trailblazer (Remembrance), increases Trailblazer (Remembrance)'s ATK by a value equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of ███'s Max HP, and increases Trailblazer (Remembrance)'s CRIT Rate by a value equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of ███'s CRIT Rate. This effect also applies to Mem. After Trailblazer (Remembrance) uses Enhanced Basic ATK in this battle, ███ immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes." If the target was defeated before this ability is used, it will be used on newly appeared enemy targets instead.
1141513.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Trailblazer (Remembrance), increases Trailblazer (Remembrance)'s ATK and CRIT Rate. This effect also applies to Mem. After Trailblazer (Remembrance) uses Enhanced Basic ATK, ███ immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes."

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

1141514.Name: Ode to Romance
1141514.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Aglaea, causes Aglaea to gain "Romance" and immediately stacks Garmentmaker's Memosprite Talent's SPD Boost effect to its upper limit. After Aglaea or Garmentmaker uses an attack, consumes "Romance" and regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. Increases DMG dealt by Aglaea and Garmentmaker by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, and ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the targets' DEF, lasting until Aglaea exits the "Supreme Stance" state.
1141514.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Aglaea, immediately stacks Aglaea's Memosprite Talent's SPD Boost effect to its upper limit. After Aglaea or Garmentmaker uses an attack, regenerates Energy. Increases DMG dealt by Aglaea and Garmentmaker, and ignores targets' DEF.

1141515.Name: Ode to Passage
1141515.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Tribbie, causes DMG dealt by Tribbie to ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of enemies' DEF. When Tribbie launches Follow-Up ATK and triggers the <u>Additional DMG</u> from Tribbie's Zone, it further deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of Additional DMG.
1141515.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Tribbie, causes DMG dealt by Tribbie to ignore enemies' DEF. When Tribbie launches Follow-Up ATK and triggers the <u>Additional DMG</u> from Tribbie's Zone, it further deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> instance(s) of Additional DMG.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1141516.Name: Ode to Strife
1141516.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Mydei, removes all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> inflicted on him. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses 1 instance of "Godslayer Be God" without consuming Charge. Mydei's CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> during this attack. If the target gets defeated before the use, then it will target the newly arriving enemy targets instead. If Mydei is not in the "Vendetta" state, then <u>advances Mydei's action</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.
1141516.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Mydei, removes <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u>. And if Mydei is in the "Vendetta" state, he automatically uses "Godslayer Be God" and increases his CRIT DMG. If he is not in the "Vendetta" state, Mydei's <u>action advances</u>.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

1141517.Name: Ode to Life and Death
1141517.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Castorice, "Newbud" can overflow up to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. When summoning Netherwing, consumes all overflowing "Newbud." For every 1% overflow amount consumed, increases the multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f2]%</unbreak></color> for the DMG dealt when this summoned Netherwing triggers the ability effect of its Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins." If there are <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> enemy target(s) or fewer on the field when summoned, the DMG multiplier additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[f2]%</unbreak></color>.
1141517.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Castorice, "Newbud" can overflow. When summoning Netherwing, consumes all overflowing "Newbud." Based on the overflow amount, increases the multiplier for the DMG dealt when this summoned Netherwing triggers the ability effect of its Talent "Wings Sweep the Ruins." If there are fewer than a certain number of enemy targets, the DMG multiplier additionally increases.

1141518.Name: Ode to Reason
1141518.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Anaxa, recovers <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s) for allies and enables Anaxa to take action immediately. Skill has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> more instances of DMG, lasting for 1 turn. The next time Anaxa uses Basic ATK or Skill, he gains "True Knowledge": All Erudition characters have their ATK increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> and their dealt Skill DMG increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting until the start of Anaxa's next turn.
1141518.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Anaxa, recovers Skill Point(s) for allies and enables Anaxa to take action immediately. Skill has more instances of DMG. All Erudition characters have increased ATK and Skill DMG dealt.

1141519.Name: Ode to Sky
1141519.Desc: When ███ uses Memosprite Skill, causes Hyacine to gain 2 stacks of "Ode to Sky." When used on Hyacine, regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Energy for Hyacine. When Hyacine has "Ode to Sky" and is providing healing, additionally increases the healing value for Little Ica's Memosprite Skill by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the healing value this time. After Hyacine uses Skill/Ultimate, consumes 1 stack of "Ode to Sky."
1141519.SimpleDesc: When ███ uses Memosprite Skill, causes Hyacine to gain 2 stacks of "Ode to Sky." When used on Hyacine, regenerates Energy for Hyacine. When Hyacine has "Ode to Sky" and is providing healing, additionally increases the healing value tallied for Little Ica's Memosprite Skill.

1141520.Name: Ode to Trickery
1141520.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Cipher, increases the DMG dealt by Cipher by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, decreases the DEF of the "Patron" by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> and decreases the DEF of all other enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>.
1141520.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. When used on Cipher, increases the DMG dealt by Cipher, and decreases the enemy targets' DEF. The DEF of the "Patron" further decreases.

1141521.Name: Ode to Worldbearing
1141521.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After it is used on Phainon, Phainon gains <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> "Coreflame" as well as "Eternal Ignition" when Transforming. When Transforming, if "Coreflame" exceeds <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak>, for each point in excess, Khaslana's CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>, up to a max increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>. While "Eternal Ignition" persists, increases Khaslana's CRIT Rate by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>. After the <u>extra turns</u> are depleted, the Transformation does not end, and all of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u> get refreshed and <unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak> "<u>Scourge</u>" is granted. At the start of <u>extra turns</u>, Khaslana consumes HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of his current HP. After using an attack, deals <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instances of <u>Additional DMG</u>, with each instance dealing Fire <u>Additional DMG</u> equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Khaslana's ATK to one random enemy.
1141521.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After it is used on Phainon, Phainon immediately gains "Coreflame," increasing Khaslana's CRIT Rate and CRIT DMG. After the <u>extra turns</u> are depleted, the Transformation does not end, <u>"Scourge"</u> is granted, and all of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u> get refreshed. At the start of <u>Khaslana's extra turns</u>, loses current HP. After attacking, deals Fire <u>Additional DMG</u> to random enemies.

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

10014081.Name: Scourge
10014081.Desc: Khaslana's exclusive charge with an upper limit of 7. Will be retained even before transforming.

10014082.Name: Khaslana's Extra Turn
10014082.Desc: When Phainon transforms into Khaslana, a countdown will appear on the Action Order. When the countdown begins, Khaslana will gain 1 extra turn. When the last turn of the countdown begins, transforms into Khaslana and delivers a final hit before ending the transformation.\nThe countdown initial action value will be set between 0–<unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The action value will not be reset at the start of each wave.\nWhen Khaslana is under the effect of action advance, the first countdown's action is advanced instead.

1141522.Name: Ode to Ocean
1141522.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Hysilens, Hysilens gains "Flowing Warmth." After Hysilens uses an attack, consumes "Flowing Warmth" and regenerates <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> Energy for this unit. In this battle, increases the DMG dealt by Hysilens by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Hysilens uses Basic ATK/Skill to attack enemies, causes all the DoT currently applied on the attacked enemy targets to immediately produce DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>/<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.
1141522.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>One-time effect</color>. When used on Hysilens, Hysilens gains "Flowing Warmth." After Hysilens uses an attack, consumes "Flowing Warmth" and regenerates Energy for this unit. Increases the DMG dealt by Hysilens. After Hysilens uses Basic ATK/Skill to attack enemies, causes all the DoT currently applied on the attacked enemy targets to immediately produce one instance of DMG.

1141523.Name: Ode to Law
1141523.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After using on Cerydra, increases the CRIT DMG of the character with "Military Merit" by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After <u>Coup de Main</u> ends, Cerydra immediately gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Charge.
1141523.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle</color>. After using on Cerydra, increases the CRIT DMG of the character with "Military Merit." After <u>Coup de Main</u> ends, Cerydra immediately gains Charge.

10000023.Name: Coup de Main
10000023.Desc: Copy and immediately use the ability about to be used, then use the original ability.\nCoup de Main won't trigger Coup de Main again.

1141524.Name: Ode to Time
1141524.Desc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle.</color> After it is used on Evernight, increases the DMG dealt when Evey uses the Memosprite Skill "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew" by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Evernight uses Skill/Ultimate, additionally gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> "Memoria." The CRIT DMG boost effect provided by the Skill is further increased by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Evernight's CRIT DMG.
1141524.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff>Effective for the entire battle.</color> After it is used on Evernight, increases the DMG dealt when Evey uses the Memosprite Skill "Dream, Dissolving, as Dew." After Evernight uses Skill/Ultimate, additionally gains "Memoria." The CRIT DMG boost effect provided by the Skill is further increased.

1141525.Name: Ode to Earth
1141525.Desc: When ███ uses Memosprite Skill, grants "Ode to Earth" to Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, and the next <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> attack(s) of "Souldragon" deals Additional DMG of the "Bondmate's" Type, equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of the "Bondmate's" Shield Effect. When Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae holds "Ode to Earth," the "Bondmate" deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> more DMG. When used on Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, additionally advances Souldragon's action by <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The Souldragon's next action gains the enhance effects of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Ultimate and the Shield Effect provided by Souldragon is <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of its original Shield value. Does not consume the enhancement Charge of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Ultimate.
1141525.SimpleDesc: When ███ uses Memosprite Skill, deals Additional DMG after "Souldragon" attacks, and Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae gains "Ode to Earth": DMG dealt by "Bondmate" increases. When used on Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, advances Souldragon's action, as well as causing Souldragon's next action to gain the enhance effects of Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae's Ultimate and increases the multiplier of Shield provided.

10000005.Name: Additional DMG
10000005.Desc: Causes the target being hit to take extra DMG, which is not considered an attack.

1141526.Name: Ode to ██
1141526.Desc: After Cyrene has gained "Recollection" from each different teammate (other than ███), when ███ uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes," it additionally deals 1 instance of Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of ███'s Max HP to one random enemy. After Cyrene uses her Ultimate or when ███ is summoned, ███ immediately gains 1 "Story." When "Story" reaches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> points, ███ consumes all "Story" points to immediately gain 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically use "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes."
1141526.SimpleDesc: For each different teammate (other than ███) from whom Cyrene has gained "Recollection," when ███ uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes," it additionally deals 1 instance of DMG to one random enemy. After Cyrene uses her Ultimate a certain number of times, ███ immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> and automatically uses "Minuet of Blooms and Plumes."

10000000.Name: Extra Turn
10000000.Desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

8001.Name: {NICKNAME}
8001.Desc: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

1.Name: A Falling Star
1.Desc: When enemies are defeated due to the Trailblazer's Ultimate, the Trailblazer regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra Energy. This effect can only be triggered once per attack.

2.Name: An Unwilling Host
2.Desc: Attacking enemies with Physical Weakness restores the Trailblazer's HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of the Trailblazer's ATK.

3.Name: A Leading Whisper
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.Name: A Destructing Glance
4.Desc: When attacking an enemy that is <u>Weakness Broken</u>, increases CRIT Rate by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000006.Name: Weakness Break State
10000006.Desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

5.Name: A Surviving Hope
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: A Trailblazing Will
6.Desc: The Trailblazer's Talent is also triggered when they defeat an enemy.

800101.Name: Farewell Hit
800101.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
800101.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Physical DMG to one enemy.

800102.Name: RIP Home Run
800102.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy and enemies adjacent to it.
800102.SimpleDesc: Deals Physical DMG to one enemy and enemies adjacent to it.

800103.Name: Stardust Ace
800103.Desc: Choose between two attack modes to deliver a full strike.\n"Blowout: Farewell Hit" deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.\n"Blowout: RIP Home Run" deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy, and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
800103.SimpleDesc: Uses Single Target ATK or Blast to strike with full force.

800104.Name: Perfect Pickoff
800104.Desc: Each time after this character inflicts Weakness Break on an enemy, ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect stacks up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).
800104.SimpleDesc: Every time this unit breaks an enemy target's Weakness, ATK increases.

800106.Name: Attack
800106.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

800107.Name: Immortal Third Strike
800107.Desc: Immediately heals all allies for <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their respective Max HP after using this Technique.
800107.SimpleDesc: After using Technique, immediately <color=#f29e38ff>restores HP</color> for team.

800108.Name: Blowout: Farewell Hit
800108.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
800108.SimpleDesc: Deals massive Physical DMG to one enemy.

800109.Name: Blowout: RIP Home Run
800109.Desc: Deals Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy and Physical DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.

800602.Desc: Deals Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy target and additionally deals DMG for 4 times, with each time dealing Imaginary DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the Trailblazer's ATK to a random enemy.
800602.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Imaginary DMG to single enemy targets with 5 Bounces in total.

800603.Name: <unbreak>All-Out</unbreak> <unbreak>Footlight Parade</unbreak>
800603.Desc: Grants all allies the Backup Dancer effect, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Trailblazer's every turn. Allies with the Backup Dancer effect have their Break Effect increased by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>. And when they attack enemy targets that are in the <u>Weakness Broken state</u>, the Toughness Reduction of the attack will be converted into 1 instance of <u>Super Break DMG</u>.
800603.SimpleDesc: Grants all allies the Backup Dancer effect. Allies with Backup Dancer have their <color=#f29e38ff>Break Effect increased</color> and additionally deal <color=#f29e38ff><u>Super Break DMG</u></color> 1 time when they attack enemy targets that are <u>Weakness Broken</u>.

10000006.Name: Weakness Break State
10000006.Desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

10000015.Name: Super Break DMG
10000015.Desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

800604.Name: Full-on Aerial Dance
800604.Desc: The Trailblazer immediately regenerates <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]</unbreak></color> Energy when an enemy target's Weakness is Broken.
800604.SimpleDesc: The Trailblazer regenerates Energy when an enemy target's Weakness is Broken.

800606.Name: Attack
800606.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

800607.Name: Now! I'm the Band!
800607.Desc: After the Technique is used, at the start of the next battle, all allies' Break Effect increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
800607.SimpleDesc: At the start of the next battle, increases all allies' Break Effect.

1.PointDesc: When the number of enemy targets on the field is 5 (or more)/4/3/2/1, the <u>Super Break DMG</u> triggered by the Backup Dancer effect increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>/<unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>.

10000015.Name: Super Break DMG
10000015.Desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

1.PointDesc: When using Skill, additionally increases the Toughness Reduction of the first instance of DMG by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
After ally targets break weakness, additionally <u>delays the action</u> of the enemy target by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000002.Name: Action Delayed
10000002.Desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

8007.Name: {NICKNAME}
8007.Desc: A {F#girl}{M#boy} who boarded the Astral Express.\n{F#She}{M#He} chose to travel with the Astral Express to eliminate the dangers posed by the Stellaron.

1.Name: Narrator of the Present
1.Desc: Increases the CRIT Rate of ally targets with "Mem's Support" by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. When an ally target has "Mem's Support," the effect of "Mem's Support" also applies to the target's memosprite/memomaster. This effect cannot stack.

2.Name: Gleaner of the Past
2.Desc: When ally memosprites (aside from Mem) take action, Trailblazer regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. This effect can trigger a max of <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s) per turn. The trigger count resets at the start of Trailblazer's turn.

3.Name: Chanter of the Future
3.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Talent Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Dancer of the Muse
4.Desc: When an ally target with 0 Max Energy actively uses an ability, Mem can also gain <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> Charge, and the multiplier of the True DMG dealt by this target via "Mem's Support" additionally increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

5.Name: Seamster of the Ode
5.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.\nMemosprite Skill Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.Name: Bearer of the Revelation
6.Desc: Ultimate's CRIT Rate is set at <unbreak>100%</unbreak>.

800701.Name: Leave It to Me!
800701.Desc: Deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK to one designated enemy.
800701.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Ice DMG to one enemy.

800702.Name: I Choose You!
800702.Desc: <u>Summons the memosprite</u> Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's Max HP, and grants Mem <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> Charge.
800702.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons the memosprite</u></color> Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP, and grants Mem <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

800703.Name: Together, Mem!
800703.Desc: <u>Summons memosprite</u> Mem. Grants Mem <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> Charge, then makes Mem deal Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK to all enemies.
800703.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons memosprite</u></color> Mem. Grants Mem <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>, then makes Mem deal massive Ice DMG to all enemies.

10000018.Name: Summon Memosprite
10000018.Desc: Summon the memosprite to the field. If the memosprite is already on the field, dispels all Crowd Control debuffs the memosprite is afflicted with.

800704.Name: Almighty Companion
800704.Desc: Memosprite Mem has an initial SPD of <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> and a Max HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's Max HP plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>. For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy regenerated by all allies in total, Mem gains 1% Charge.
800704.SimpleDesc: Every time <color=#f29e38ff>a certain amount of Energy is regenerated</color> by all allies, Mem gains <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>.

800706.Name: Attack
800706.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

800707.Name: Memories Back as Echoes
800707.Desc: After using Technique, creates a Special Dimension that lasts for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Enemies within the Special Dimension are placed in a Time Stop state, halting all their actions.\nAfter entering battle against enemies afflicted with the Time Stop state, <u>delays the action</u> of all enemies by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and then deals Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Trailblazer's ATK.\nOnly 1 Dimension Effect created by allies can exist at the same time.
800707.SimpleDesc: Creates a Special Dimension. Enemies in the dimension <color=#f29e38ff>cease actions</color>. When entering battle against enemies in the dimension, <u>delays the action</u> of all enemies and deals minor Ice DMG to all enemies.

10000002.Name: Action Delayed
10000002.Desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

800708.Name: Together, We Script Tomorrow!
800708.Desc: Consumes 1 stack of "Epic" to dispel all <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> on Mem. Trailblazer and Mem launch a <u>Joint ATK</u>, dealing Ice DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Trailblazer's ATK and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK respectively. Then, Mem gains <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> Charge.
800708.SimpleDesc: Consumes 1 stack of "Epic" to dispel <u>Crowd Control debuffs</u> on Mem. Trailblazer and Mem launch a <u>Joint ATK</u> and respectively deal Ice DMG to all enemies. Then, Mem gains Charge.

10000011.Name: Crowd Control debuff
10000011.Desc: Freeze, Entanglement, Imprisonment, Dominated, Outrage, Strong Reverberation, Alien Dream, Snarelock, Terrified, Action Lock.

10000019.Name: Joint Attack
10000019.Desc: Multiple targets respectively use attacks on enemy targets in one action.

800709.Name: I Choose You!
800709.SimpleDesc: <color=#f29e38ff><u>Summons the memosprite</u></color> Mem. If Mem is already on the field, restores Mem's HP, and grants Mem <color=#f29e38ff>Charge</color>.

10000001.Name: Action Advanced
10000001.Desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.PointDesc: When using "Baddies! Trouble!," Mem immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> Charge.

When the Max Energy of an ally target that has "Mem's Support" exceeds <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> excess Energy, additionally increases the multiplier of the <u>True DMG</u> dealt via "Mem's Support" by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, up to a max increase of <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>.

10000017.Name: True DMG
10000017.Desc: Non-Type DMG that is not affected by any effects. This DMG is not considered as using 1 attack.

1.PointDesc: After using Ultimate, gains 1 stack of "Epic," up to <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> stacks. When this unit has "Epic" and Mem is on the field, Basic ATK gets enhanced to "Together, We Script Tomorrow!"

1800701.Name: Baddies! Trouble!
1800701.Desc: Deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK to one random enemy. At the end, deals Ice DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's ATK to all enemies.
1800701.SimpleDesc: Deals minor Ice DMG that Bounces a total of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s). Deals minor Ice DMG to all enemies at the end.

1800703.Name: Friends! Together!
1800703.Desc: Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by an amount equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Mem's CRIT DMG plus <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>.\nIf the Charge has yet to reach <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, Mem automatically uses "Baddies! Trouble!" when taking action. When the Charge reaches <unbreak>100%</unbreak>, Mem immediately takes action. In the next action, can select one ally and use "Lemme! Help You!".
